clean_body: The Supreme Court just sent a MAJOR blow to Voting Rights... | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. This is devastating, but we refuse to give up! We can protect voting rights by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. So we’re launching a brand new petition to support this critical bill!! | We are running out of time to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. | Don’t wait, take action now! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . clean_body: Mike Pompeo knows better than anyone that our country is worth fighting for. | | | | | Mike Pompeo has had enough. As an Army Cavalry Officer, a businessman, elected leader, President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State, he has devoted his life to standing up for our American values every single day. | | Mike Pompeo is driven by his faith and his unyielding belief in the American people. He knows that our country's future is unbelievably bright IF we are willing to stand up for what is right and protect our core American values. While the Left is pushing socialist policies and "canceling" anyone who doesn't support their extreme agenda, Mike Pompeo is focused on championing American values with his new organization dedicated to advancing the America First Agenda and taking back the House and Senate. Under Mike Pompeo's leadership, CAVPAC is committed to championing our core American values, including: Preserving religious freedom Safeguarding the Second Amendment Protecting the unborn Securing our borders Standing up for the rule of law "Mike Pompeo is recruiting committed conservatives to join his movement, and YOU have been selected for an EXCLUSIVE founding membership offer." Will you join Mike and millions of patriots in standing up to the radical Left? "BECOME A CAVPAC FOUNDING MEMBER"** "Join CAVPAC and help Mike Pompeo keep the fight alive for our American values. " Your membership today will send a clear message to the radical Left that we refuse to let them destroy America. Mike Pompeo knows better than anyone that our country is worth fighting for. Mike has always talked the talk and walked the walk. Now he needs your help. Let's not let him down. Are you with us? \- The Champion American Values Team P.S. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Defund the ATF
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57874300:J_SkbclxN:m:1:3103520637:F5B3216873A61A17FC3B9B8D79D8EC09:r "Defund the ATF") Peter, I have introduced a bill to defund and abolish the ATF, and I will not rest until it passes into law. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57874300:J_SkbclxN:m:1:3103520637:F5B3216873A61A17FC3B9B8D79D8EC09:r "Headline")This will really upset the little communist from New York - the woman also known as AOC--**she is VERY UPSET when Americans stand up for their rights.** I'm Marjorie Taylor Greene. Someone needs to stand up to AOC, Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and anyone else who believes that the conservative movement will sit back while they strip away more of our freedoms--not going to happen. This push will make me a target of every gun-grabbing liberal group in America and their billionaire backers which is why AOC's friends in the media are after me again. Even AOC is scared to debate me on these issues because they know you stand with me. **[Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $25 will send a strong message that we are not done fighting. As we celebrate our nation's Independence from tyranny once again, it's important that we ensure no one can ever take our inalienable rights away.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57874301:J_SkbclxN:m:1:3103520637:F5B3216873A61A17FC3B9B8D79D8EC09:r "Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even
just $25 will send a strong message that we are not done fighting. As we celebrate our nation’s Independence from tyranny once again, it’s
important that we ensure no one can ever take our inalienable rights away.")** As violent crime skyrockets across the nation - Joe Biden and AOC are working overtime to defund the police, abolish our 2A rights and eliminate any hope that we can protect our families and ourselves from their friends in Antifa and BLM. These socialists just want you to do whatever they say, and if you don't, you're viewed as a threat and punished--just like they keep trying to do to me with their Congressional "censure" and removing me from committees. It's also why these Big Government socialists keep attacking me for standing up for our freedoms and against their attempts to act like Joseph Stalin, Fidel Castro, and Mao Tse Tung. **_That is the root of liberal power, and it is terrifying._** They are still trying to remove me from Congress, but your support has proven to be the firewall I need to keep being a thorn in their side. **[Join the movement to defund and demolish the ATF before they can do more harm to American freedom.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57874300:J_SkbclxN:m:1:3103520637:F5B3216873A61A17FC3B9B8D79D8EC09:r "Join the movement to defund and demolish the ATF before they can
do more harm to American freedom.")** We have to fight back against the radical left's tyranny just like our Founding Fathers fought back against King George III, **_and we have to win._** **[With your help, we'll win the war of ideas and then win at the ballot box by taking back the Majority in just 15 months.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57874300:J_SkbclxN:m:1:3103520637:F5B3216873A61A17FC3B9B8D79D8EC09:r "With your help, we’ll win
the war of ideas and then win at the ballot box by taking back the Majority in just 15 months.")** **I need to hear from you before it is too late.** For America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57874300:J_SkbclxN:m:1:3103520637:F5B3216873A61A17FC3B9B8D79D8EC09:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene") Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

body:
Calling All Patriots: look inside!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57875879:JkeZucl8N:m:1:3253819041:B5D95623EB7C66CA20B4AFEF6015137E:r)

**The Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable**. From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated are invited to join the 1776 Donor Club.

_Congratulations, Peter, you 're one of them!_

[**To join, all you have to do is chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left 's attacks.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57875879:JkeZucl8N:m:1:3253819041:B5D95623EB7C66CA20B4AFEF6015137E:r)

Peter, 245 years ago our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

_**But now those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That's why we're asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi's socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone....

[**ACCEPT INVITATION**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57875879:JkeZucl8N:m:1:3253819041:B5D95623EB7C66CA20B4AFEF6015137E:r)

[**CHIP IN $17.76**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57875879:JkeZucl8N:m:1:3253819041:B5D95623EB7C66CA20B4AFEF6015137E:r)

America's Founders fought for our independence from big government. Now you've got the chance to do the same. [**Chip in $17.76 ASAP!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57875879:JkeZucl8N:m:1:3253819041:B5D95623EB7C66CA20B4AFEF6015137E:r)

Thank you,

1776 Donor Club

body:
This is how we win.

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31966749/294283752/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDIwMThjMC02OGRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRqFL0tMnlBt9LEmuKeOSQa1G2IuVosE8TMTw9yXB4U=)

| | Peter, From day one, we’ve talked about how this campaign is going to be different. Every step of our path to victory will be blazed by grassroots organizing -- _that’s how we win._ **This summer we’re launching the biggest organizing campaign Western North Carolina has ever seen --[and on August 14th, we’re calling on our supporters to join us for a Day of Action!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31966750/294283753/77935820?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDIwMThjMC02OGRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRqFL0tMnlBt9LEmuKeOSQa1G2IuVosE8TMTw9yXB4U=&emci=60111078-6adb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=242018c0-68de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22032259)** | | | [Sign up to get the info](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31966751/294283754/77935820?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDIwMThjMC02OGRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRqFL0tMnlBt9LEmuKeOSQa1G2IuVosE8TMTw9yXB4U=&emci=60111078-6adb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=242018c0-68de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22032259)

Jasmine

body:

Friend,

**I am emailing you with an urgent request and I hope to have your feedback.** As a conservative patriot,[**your help today can sponsor a young conservative professional to start their career.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4861%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7jgXWYpedn6UN3qQT%2fqGaw&sysid=1)

Can you imagine what it’s like being a young conservative in this day and age?

You survive college professors, administrators, and campus radicals harassing you for having a different opinion... Now, you have to deal with it all again in a corporate "Woke" climate.

As you know, corporations, the media, and the culture have become more “Woke” than ever. Leftist culture has become so dominant in the workplace, cancel culture is driving young conservative professionals away.

**Friend, I am the Executive Director of America’s Future (AF).** I am hoping you can help sponsor a conservative professional today to get the skills and training needed to launch their career.

[**Can you sponsor a young conservative professional to kick off their career?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4862%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ppBcIYZreuAQJCKzhx127g&sysid=1)

Fully Sponsor a Young Professional for $2,500 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4863%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2myCfh4HB%2fvE6kY2oUGYLA&sysid=1)

Here’s how America’s Future (AF) is helping the next generation of young professionals.

AF is building a community of young professionals who understand the values of limited government, free speech, and freedom of association.
* By training young professionals to get them placed in promising careers.
* By offering mentoring to established professionals.
* By offering masterclasses fighting for local policies.
* By providing nationwide networking opportunities for young conservatives.

**Friend, by sponsoring a young professional, you will help them directly build their resume, find job opportunities, attend masterclasses in their profession, and ultimately, change their culture and community.**

_“Many organizations focus on high school and college students. AF uniquely focuses on the emerging years, people in their 20s and 30s. They are developing their lifelong beliefs during this period. We have to win those hearts and minds and AF is fully committed to that effort.”_ \- **John Tillman, AF Board of Directors and CEO of Illinois Policy Institute**
**I am looking to find sponsors for 4 more young professionals.**

[**Donate Any Amount >>>
Fully Sponsor a Young Professional for $2,500 >>>

Don’t look to politicians to dig us out of this mess. To reclaim a workplace that promotes individualism, free speech, and our values, it will require us to help young conservatives today.

Cindy Cerquitella

name: Ras for Iowa
subject: SCOTUS just dealt another blow to voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31974084/294316231/2118730081?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210706voting_rfi_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTY1MWY2My03ZWRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-WuhbcWNBrwgI3Eb3VvPhxn9hd3yRixHy9Ct6ZrV2MA=)
---
Friends, We shared your Launch Survey results with Ras and tallied up the responses, and by far, your top issue was: voting rights. **Just last Friday, the U.S. Supreme Court gave a devastating 6-3 ruling to uphold Arizona’s new voting restrictions — dealing another major blow to the Voting Rights Act.** What does this mean? Well, GOP leaders in Arizona passed suppressive voter restrictions that a lower court found to “disproportionately burden Black, Latino, and Native American voters.” Despite the clear impact on communities of color, a majority of Supreme Court justices decided to let Arizona keep these restrictions in place. This is bad news for our democracy, team, and it’s a disturbing nationwide trend following the record-breaking voter turnout all across the country in 2020. We saw it ourselves here in Iowa just a couple months ago when Governor Reynolds signed a bill to shorten our state’s early voting period and close polls earlier — a bill Ras strongly opposed and voted against. **[We need to be making it easier for Iowans and all Americans to vote, not harder. If you agree, join Ras in opposing this latest attack on voters and calling for our leaders to strengthen, instead of weaken, our voting rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31974085/294316232/232381897?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210706voting_rfi_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTY1MWY2My03ZWRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-WuhbcWNBrwgI3Eb3VvPhxn9hd3yRixHy9Ct6ZrV2MA=&emci=44651f63-7ede-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=45651f63-7ede-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)** **** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31974086/294316233/232381897?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210706voting_rfi_full_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTY1MWY2My03ZWRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-WuhbcWNBrwgI3Eb3VvPhxn9hd3yRixHy9Ct6ZrV2MA=&emci=44651f63-7ede-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=45651f63-7ede-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help, Peter
body:
Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. ** ** **In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents...** And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. [**That is why I am urgently asking you and every other American patriot reading this letter to contribute $35 or more to help us sue Twitter and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57879755:6tmcWcl9N:m:1:3253819041:8EDE3BBC14DDC8427E994F12D2817FB1:r) Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57879755:6tmcWcl9N:m:1:3253819041:8EDE3BBC14DDC8427E994F12D2817FB1:r) You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. _**Then it happened ...**_ After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - _who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. _ It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. **And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. ** ** ** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57879755:6tmcWcl9N:m:1:3253819041:8EDE3BBC14DDC8427E994F12D2817FB1:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. **And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought.** You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. _ _ _And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000._ _ _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a one-time contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57879755:6tmcWcl9N:m:1:3253819041:8EDE3BBC14DDC8427E994F12D2817FB1:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? [**I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing any amount to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57879755:6tmcWcl9N:m:1:3253819041:8EDE3BBC14DDC8427E994F12D2817FB1:r) Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57879755:6tmcWcl9N:m:1:3253819041:8EDE3BBC14DDC8427E994F12D2817FB1:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57879755:6tmcWcl9N:m:1:3253819041:8EDE3BBC14DDC8427E994F12D2817FB1:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57879755:6tmcWcl9N:m:1:3253819041:8EDE3BBC14DDC8427E994F12D2817FB1:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57879755:6tmcWcl9N:m:1:3253819041:8EDE3BBC14DDC8427E994F12D2817FB1:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

clean_body: Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents... And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. Then it happened ... After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought. You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. name: Peter Franchot
subject: My plan to empower voters
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
Many of our fellow Marylanders are alienated from the political process. Some choose not to vote because they feel unrepresented, or that their voices aren’t heard. Others may wish to vote but face significant barriers to participation, despite their best efforts to avoid them. Our voters deserve better -- which is why I have a plan to empower voters in the political process as your next Governor.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/pV_lchh9W0SUezvm7cVpVA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/pV_lchh9W0SUezvm7cVpVA2]The vote-by-mail system utilized in 2020 saw significant expansion of the electorate. It’s no secret that when you make it easier for people to vote, more people do it -- which is why I’m going to expand vote-by-mail options to ensure that everyone has access to this easy and efficient method of casting their ballot. I’ll champion legislation that creates a universal, well-run, and transparent vote-by-mail system in which every Marylander receives a ballot via mail that can be returned by mail or drop box. Additionally, we’ll continue to offer in-person early and Election Day balloting so Marylanders have the freedom to vote at a time that works best for them.
If you want to help me make it easier for Marylanders to vote, then will you sign on to my plan to empower voters in the political process with new reforms like expanding vote-by-mail? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/pV_lchh9W0SUezvm7cVpVA2]
I’m also going to tackle the scourge of gerrymandering. By forming an independent redistricting commission, I’ll end the practice of politicians picking their voters once and for all. I’m also committed to introducing legislation that would create single member districts for the Maryland House of Delegates -- so we can finally end the system of nearly unbeatable four-legislator slates, which insulate incumbents from challengers.
Additionally, I will also introduce legislation to allow unaffiliated voters to participate in Primary Elections by affiliating with a party of their choice. Unaffiliated voters are a rapidly growing population in Maryland -- and they deserve to be heard just like everyone else.
We have an opportunity to introduce reforms that will strengthen our democracy. I hope you will join me in this fight. Click here to add your name to my plan to empower voters in the political process. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/pV_lchh9W0SUezvm7cVpVA2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em070521]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/296a466b-49d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/201ce8ff-83de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDFjZThmZi04M2RlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oBxPrzkf1WEmoqsO0qBMqhE9sPoQLrmyWf3EWEt27ew=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

The 4th of July, Independence Day, is the one day in America when Americans really come together to celebrate the greatest country in the world. It's a powerful reminder that we are all united as Americans.
But Maxine Waters just used it to further divide us, and really proved how much she hates the country she is supposed to be representing.

body:
So my blood begins to boil when I see "woke" Olympic athletes turn their back to our flag For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=42bbaccf7df542449d10bc92cdc6ddd1&_t=ZQe5ZPWDo3IZv31krwJSEpfod-vNMGwB5PMLND3F8ftJQPeTJzro2nSISEs402BtvpMMSUxMSxw43Lsqt4-Uf_aX2EvYESbHoSGKdqBb4Cd196OMvpNzeqW2Uu8tNIfD0FBN9tHxB2YFOUISFiuq5fN4hPQAZF3nL8zXyDkmBC4%3D) | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42bbaccf7df542449d10bc92cdc6ddd1&_e=o6FPJdlUlAqcfB8u2mDGCC2mSwoC6sjv7A_j6Nq1GGYjmfEcUG5-t-KmRsSFeAn_sSjJ-beik2EEaEEq-t0dGhZ8Ds422Us_4LcrgXjTiZ6LQX8Q-6z6cWc_fHb23WW_B3MPdbjVkagMqfE8yQKnBavHGoMK5Wq9OzCiYiNJJvQGg2iBqU96KPcsAbpXviT0MQ69gef4C9q_qrWIeY2P6yHYk_E5_7RgiVYykR7qcaPXHgN9aQXA24JkwZOq8P5vT_jmyfWfOlw-vf-7J7f5ubVwPM6qSk_aRH6EXHPIPmkEXPApmiyH20UMtQCxPe6iLCdfWUVlfVMdrjgl-ixQeuNV40MiCcaI4_Q9f8Fh93lYm-0MxrMWnqIEETSTJKAJSWjDcXir3RDm848QflGhf3ooISPWWj77BbvQUAVH7h_pidSLIOqhZazp1eRuAm8XzaHy8_EYc1-IuZ6Mp3HEcoCoTHSDDU0X4OsOEed2M1pXstxDVlP3Ng334uV4HrHk)
---

Peter,

For 11 years, I proudly wore the American flag on my arm as a member of the Army’s Special Operations Command. During each of my seven deployments, Old Glory was a constant companion; every morning that I woke up, **the American flag was one of the first things I set my eyes on** – at the end of the day, our flag was one of the last things I would look at before going to sleep.

**I wore the stars and stripes proudly as my team and I hunted the Islamic terrorists who attacked the American compound in Benghazi and killed Ambassador Chris Stevens**.

So, when I recently read in the paper that Olympic athlete Gwen Berry turned away from the American flag after qualifying to represent the United States in Tokyo later this month, **it made my blood boil**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42bbaccf7df542449d10bc92cdc6ddd1&_e=o6FPJdlUlAqcfB8u2mDGCC2mSwoC6sjv7A_j6Nq1GGYjmfEcUG5-t-KmRsSFeAn_sSjJ-beik2EEaEEq-t0dGhZ8Ds422Us_4LcrgXjTiZ6LQX8Q-6z6cWc_fHb23WW_B3MPdbjVkagMqfE8yQKnBavHGoMK5Wq9OzCiYiNJJvQGg2iBqU96KPcsAbpXviT0MQ69gef4C9q_qrWIeY2P6yHYk_E5_7RgiVYykR7qcaPXHgN9aQXA24JkwZOq8P5vT_jmyfWfOlw-vf-7J7f5ubVwPM6qSk_aRH6EXHPIPmlruW3q8XdV1ub9L_KlxX58Q2UDgdvXpxSHuNCrA0fuXmSvvk0ij5zwvomLb6AeFxrXpWqBHpb_vH1Bn74irD77tGbabQGgUvpDpKoymrexqRUU_iupbzjcg0e7P6swwnYujRKV_VQEz8ghHYwJgwyESX8M6JzyTELcN3sZ547OXqmfRbw28mj-NB5lWmI_4FGf3JW0woQI7gzcjR3DNaey)
_Gwen Berry turning her back to the American flag following Olympic trials on June 26th_
**[This morning, I had an idea and I’m hoping you’ll chip in a few dollars to help me out](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42bbaccf7df542449d10bc92cdc6ddd1&_e=o6FPJdlUlAqcfB8u2mDGCC2mSwoC6sjv7A_j6Nq1GGYjmfEcUG5-t-KmRsSFeAn_sSjJ-beik2EEaEEq-t0dGhZ8Ds422Us_4LcrgXjTiZ6LQX8Q-6z6cWc_fHb23WW_B3MPdbjVkagMqfE8yQKnBavHGoMK5Wq9OzCiYiNJJvQGg2iBqU96KPcsAbpXviT0MQ69gef4C9q_qrWIeY2P6yHYk_E5_7RgiVYykR7qcaPXHgN9aQXA24JkwZOq8P5vT_jmyfWfOlw-vf-7J7f5ubVwPM6qSk_aRH6EXHPIPmmgpXhHvZvr83Ew-5zC2dJ4hnzJAUgbx-wrEvYXsiFLttoL_PYR3jSngn_10nkpByYD9Fm9raQZ--uehkr_VmDtSG5Oa9I4HoNDG5_7SrRrXOUsS6ltXLiOnFwh8dRSEDJauJi2qrT4Vk_93Ww1i1mQnUlTWb3-iMHQCExnQkaEX6pQ8vZOJTtjkozMSl6BNZPI2KpsIXkZlOxDfLYnmohM)**. If Ms. Berry wants to turn her back to the American flag, let’s send as many American flags as money can buy to the United States Olympic Committee in her name. I can buy a flag from a veteran owned flag manufacturer for $2.40. **[For every donation of $5 more to my campaign, I’ll send an American Flag to Gwen Berry](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42bbaccf7df542449d10bc92cdc6ddd1&_e=o6FPJdlUlAqcfB8u2mDGCC2mSwoC6sjv7A_j6Nq1GGYjmfEcUG5-t-KmRsSFeAn_sSjJ-beik2EEaEEq-t0dGhZ8Ds422Us_4LcrgXjTiZ6LQX8Q-6z6cWc_fHb23WW_B3MPdbjVkagMqfE8yQKnBavHGoMK5Wq9OzCiYiNJJvQGg2iBqU96KPcsAbpXviT0MQ69gef4C9q_qrWIeY2P6yHYk_E5_7RgiVYykR7qcaPXHgN9aQXA24JkwZOq8P5vT_jmyfWfOlw-vf-7J7f5ubVwPM6qSk_aRH6EXHPIPmllylqcDReAEo-8NU_pfX3i_ugh38fRNOyIxhVKsEWE5MRbIogDBbwqx4OnE6qPpuKN2Mp0seeHbsBBHKFBoJIjm6l6zNVe1gwcnBKOyMYYPRY7n3PFx8F5kKbjb5STZOrOYrlTVkyNcGKGTg8KRe7G3j2QIZu6KeezVozL2dsoLtfw_4HPgL9GMfqyVzpWj0YPL-Lc1icjicwVOfKqd6KL)**.

| [**STAND WITH ME AND OLD GLORY
SEND A FLAG TO GWEN BERRY ** **› › **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42bbaccf7df542449d10bc92cdc6ddd1&_e=o6FPJdlUlAqcfB8u2mDGCC2mSwoC6sjv7A_j6Nq1GGYjmfEcUG5-t-KmRsSFeAn_sSjJ-beik2EEaEEq-t0dGhZ8Ds422Us_4LcrgXjTiZ6LQX8Q-6z6cWc_fHb23WW_B3MPdbjVkagMqfE8yQKnBavHGoMK5Wq9OzCiYiNJJvQGg2iBqU96KPcsAbpXviT0MQ69gef4C9q_qrWIeY2P6yHYk_E5_7RgiVYykR7qcaPXHgN9aQXA24JkwZOq8P5vT_jmyfWfOlw-vf-7J7f5ubVwPM6qSk_aRH6EXHPIPmkvYTLC3xnMRnSaHY-NkYaCEWhDUY6scufdQk89MKV48YA4_Kbik-bxmWCR0PHekrr9Cz0RxazT7RjOZPC_nKppeNVGNqVcVW3xf00ejOBo0xUXMwsHYsoMPdhRYt_AyoTx3qRyuNCDcuChj1pA7NvhqaY7otifXf7sVcvuxX0phaFibFVlkqn02RpZH4eHfsE2jO66PMwUfE9TAyy8s1xU)
---

As a Targeting officer within the Intelligence Community, I _**proudly**_ wore the stars and stripes on my right arm as my team and I hunted and neutralized terrorists on the Arabian Peninsula, terrorists who were hired by Iran to wreak havoc on freedom-loving people everywhere.

My name is John Castorani. I’m a proud veteran, father, husband, and most important of all: I’m a proud American. **I love this country so damn much that I left a career in the intelligence community to run for Congress, because honestly, just look at the people representing us right now.**

The United States is far from a perfect country, but we’re a country constantly in a state of improvement. _**Imagine if an athlete from China pulled such a stunt? They would be arrested**_.

I’ll leave you with one last thought today. I worked alongside the FBIs Hostage Recovery team to recover a US citizen being held captive in the African country of Uganda, and I can only imagine the pure sense of joy and relief the individual experienced when they caught a glimpse of the American flag on our right arms and heard the words “ _**We’re from the United States, and we’re here to take you home**_.”

I hope Ms. Berry realizes how ironic it is that only in the United States could an Olympic athlete turn their back on the American flag, then be welcomed home without punishment.

We owe everything we have to the United States, however imperfect of a country we are. We’re so fortunate to call ourselves Americans.

**[I hope you’ll help me send Gwen Berry as many American flags as money can buy, we can’t let her forget who she is going to representing at the Olympics in Tokyo this month](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42bbaccf7df542449d10bc92cdc6ddd1&_e=o6FPJdlUlAqcfB8u2mDGCC2mSwoC6sjv7A_j6Nq1GGYjmfEcUG5-t-KmRsSFeAn_sSjJ-beik2EEaEEq-t0dGhZ8Ds422Us_4LcrgXjTiZ6LQX8Q-6z6cWc_fHb23WW_B3MPdbjVkagMqfE8yQKnBavHGoMK5Wq9OzCiYiNJJvQGg2iBqU96KPcsAbpXviT0MQ69gef4C9q_qrWIeY2P6yHYk_E5_7RgiVYykR7qcaPXHgN9aQXA24JkwZOq8P5vT_jmyfWfOlw-vf-7J7f5ubVwPM6qSk_aRH6EXHPIPmk_xPfUAJNlbQCu68eDnCtirBzVnrkcYmRAp_Fizq0ufMkVWcRTV41y_mANMQe8TARrxg6BSmtmhyc4OIt0dUxqoR-rxP4MGpBWzFu1Mxt2q18f3OoEWKKX9QZcPcV5VSmM3K38htNhj8i62w5vWjCaUcVQIIGLPJwzszTn7Th3z_F5w-2Dz-_XIKhEKLwVNxagdxnAtX6ymepog4jYByD1)**.

[**STAND WITH ME AND OLD GLORY
SEND A FLAG TO GWEN BERRY ** **› › **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42bbaccf7df542449d10bc92cdc6ddd1&_e=o6FPJdlUlAqcfB8u2mDGCC2mSwoC6sjv7A_j6Nq1GGYjmfEcUG5-t-KmRsSFeAn_sSjJ-beik2EEaEEq-t0dGhZ8Ds422Us_4LcrgXjTiZ6LQX8Q-6z6cWc_fHb23WW_B3MPdbjVkagMqfE8yQKnBavHGoMK5Wq9OzCiYiNJJvQGg2iBqU96KPcsAbpXviT0MQ69gef4C9q_qrWIeY2P6yHYk_E5_7RgiVYykR7qcaPXHgN9aQXA24JkwZOq8P5vT_jmyfWfOlw-vf-7J7f5ubVwPM6qSk_aRH6EXHPIPmkjI3opFBd3ysxLqUWgKZBO9pEqaQWkwqeKBA7P_2tw5k2J9cYJf5o8bncG0XmkPa6td2tt3NLVDVq7Qd9-xUISuPkjRXZ1NmahQjFKWxkMMXA96QuZsHyvu-GAj_ddEL7-OpYCLGi4Dg2ZCW8jG-DqWUrdUyAYpelEeUmPg6g2ku_j65WreigXedEu-DFojz0xYEXqYsx7iRM-iHVNE-M-)
---

For Old Glory
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer wrote the following op-ed for your consideration. | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/chairman-hupfer-statement-on-2021-indiana-inauguration-470658?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3bb5d8342d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **Contact:** Jake Oakman, [joakman@indiana.gop](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=52ac9db6df&e=1acd9bb3d6) **Date:** July 6, 2021
_**GOP Chairman Hupfer: Don’t Fall for Democrat Gaslighting on Police**_ **INDIANAPOLIS-** Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer wrote the following op-ed for your consideration. If you intend to publish this piece or have any questions, please send an email to [info@indiana.gop](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=efc3e3229c&e=1acd9bb3d6). Thank you.
**GOP Chairman Hupfer: Don’t Fall for Democrat Gaslighting on Police**
For the last year and a half, leaders of the Democrat Party have embraced the radical, ANTIFA’-inspired agenda to “defund the police.” Several Democrat-run cities drastically cut their law enforcement budgets over the last year. Democrat Party officials, including Joe Biden’s handlers, Nancy Pelosi, and the Squad, have encouraged this movement and their dangerous rhetoric has made it more difficult for the men and women of law enforcement to do their jobs and keep us safe.

Well, it seems someone in the Democrat Party looked at some disastrous polling because for the last week or so they, along with their allies in the national news media, have embarked on a hilarious attempt at gaslighting the American people. They contend it is actually the Republican Party that wants to defund the police. In making this argument, Democrats are 1) lying to you and 2) must think you’re stupid.

The lie goes something like this: there was some money for police in their monstrosity of a “COVID relief” bill. The bill, which spent nearly $2 trillion dollars on everything under the sun with less than 9% dealing with healthcare and only 1% going to COVID vaccination efforts, was rightly opposed by Republicans and since Republicans voted against it somehow this means Republicans defunded the police.

Our Republican Senators—Todd Young and Mike Braun—and our Republican House delegation— Jim Baird, Jim Banks, Dr. Larry Bucshon, Trey Hollingsworth, Greg Pence, Victoria Spartz, and Jackie Walorski—were right to oppose the leftwing Trojan Horse masquerading as pandemic relief. They voted against reckless spending, mountains of new debt, and skyrocketing inflation that is already causing your gas prices and grocery bills to go up and up.

You almost have to give Democrat officials and talking heads credit. It’s a bold strategy, one that assumes you have a short memory and don’t have access to Google or YouTube, where simple searches reveal example after example of Democrat candidates and office holders embracing the defund the police movement.

Republicans will always back the blue – and we hope our Democrat friends across the country can renounce the radical leaders of their party and join us in supporting the police. In fact, during Governor Holcomb’s first legislative session in 2017, he advocated for a pay raise for all Indiana State Police personnel. The governor’s proposal passed, and our state police officers have received well-deserved pay raises each year Holcomb has been in office.

But that’s not all. Under Governor Eric Holcomb’s leadership, a landmark law enforcement bill was unanimously passed by both houses of the Indiana General Assembly during the most recent legislative session. HB-1006 is investing in law enforcement by improving training, increasing resources, and giving our men and women in blue the support they need to do their jobs safely and effectively. It’s a model that other states should follow.

The bill was part of Governor Holcomb’s 2021 legislative agenda, received support from both parties, and is also supported by the Fraternal Order of Police, the Indiana Association of Chiefs of Police, the Indiana Sheriff’s Association, NAACP, Indianapolis Urban League, Indiana Black Expo, and members of the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus.

HB-1066 invests $70 million to modernize the Indiana Law Enforcement Academy (ILEA), ensuring our officers receive the best training possible. The bill also mandated de-escalation training and prohibits the use of chokeholds in most circumstances. It also established procedures for ILEA to decertify officers for misconduct and makes it illegal to turn off officer-worn body cameras. Additionally, the General Assembly is purchasing body cameras for all law enforcement agencies in the state and is modernizing several Indiana State Police posts as well as National Guard armories.

As Governor Holcomb says, it takes teamwork to take Indiana to the Next Level. When it came to HB-1066, we had an all-star team of state legislators that got this bill to the governor’s desk, including Speaker of the House Todd Huston, Senate President Pro Tempore Rod Bray, and Senator Mike Young. Our point guard was Representative Greg Steuerwald, whose tireless efforts brought together a huge coalition that led to unanimity. The standing ovation Rep. Steuerwald received from his colleagues upon passage was well deserved.

These Republican-led efforts are exactly how you back the blue. Compare that to the rhetoric of Democrat leaders Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, AOC, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and others and it is clear to see which party steadfastly supports law enforcement and which party’s dangerous rhetoric has endangered those serving on the thin blue line.

Don’t let the Democrats gaslight you. The record is clear.

_Kyle Hupfer is Chairman of the Indiana Republican Party and serves as General Counsel of the Republican National Committee._

A headshot of Chairman Hupfer is available [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=76659becc1&e=1acd9bb3d6).
**-30-**

_President Trump personally traveled to the border to investigate the crisis and lend his support to our immigration officers.**That’s real leadership.**_
But President Trump can’t solve this crisis alone, Peter. He need Grassroots Republicans like you to stand by his side to help **SAVE AMERICA** and Elect Republicans so we can finish the wall and secure the border.

clean_body: You don’t support President Trump’s wall? | Our southern border is in crisis, Peter. | | President Trump personally traveled to the border to investigate the crisis and lend his support to our immigration officers.That’s real leadership. But President Trump can’t solve this crisis alone, Peter. He need Grassroots Republicans like you to stand by his side to help SAVE AMERICA and Elect Republicans so we can finish the wall and secure the border. Our records show that you’ve one of the Top Trump Supporters in Englewood, FL , but we are concerned that those records may be out of date. We need to reconfirm your support right away. YOUR DONOR RECORD EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #040945 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $35 or more | | | | | | | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

body:
This week marked the 100th anniversary of the CCP, and Xi Jinping is celebrating by unleashing a tidal wave of... [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=bfe791eeef37413db722a3e9def2ef4d&_e=HC5ROeMRlbA4G7Wa1gWsFEnFatud3PYXYSPLGgNUFvyr8FTw13LyzVrvraAPzlAjsDFo6cTTP5aTd15MiV2AdyaJRTvJ0rLls_glKae72Jp7emaQ_UEiacMbVDcWn95Ph3Kh6Xos8rr5AjyDh4a_Kpql1fI7aqWYyvlg4MhHnLJx3ezPSUfyqmdF93FUa5KTvVWhSxCNhVHkNYw1S58qO91fBJI33ngZBLrsyOY85FciZchQ1dbChxvlke15D2CuVy0S1qsRL3JZDByCF3gnMfkvLUxZkwDsvMQp0bzzBKNw2ywsF7dDahOJakc_j-s3NZZk1uSZ9K0N0Sy0GumY7EY2oIobvWHh2n8Mb4wGGL8gfTF5DyQlUhpro_QV8-XEbqRSuKRZu-7oOgDlN0czUBiAE7AoZbfQdeZIHBumpcxzTxm30NbuBqXz6jvNu4ic) Peter, History speaks for itself: **Human rights abuses are hardwired into the DNA of the Chinese Communist Party.** From the Tiananmen Square Massacre to the ongoing genocide in Xinjiang, the CCP is responsible for _dozens_ of unspeakable crimes against humanity, many of which are being carried out at this very moment. **This week marked the 100th anniversary of the CCP** , and Xi Jinping celebrated by unleashing a tidal wave of communist propaganda in an effort to rewrite history and force the Chinese people to “follow the party forever.” I decided to mark the occasion a little differently – by introducing a resolution in Congress condemning the CCP for a century of human rights abuses, oppression, and brutality, and I’d like for you to join me. [**_ADD YOUR NAME: CONDEMN THE CCP >>>_**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=bfe791eeef37413db722a3e9def2ef4d&_e=HC5ROeMRlbA4G7Wa1gWsFEnFatud3PYXYSPLGgNUFvyr8FTw13LyzVrvraAPzlAjsDFo6cTTP5aTd15MiV2AdyaJRTvJ0rLls_glKae72Jp7emaQ_UEiacMbVDcWn95Ph3Kh6Xos8rr5AjyDh4a_Kpql1fI7aqWYyvlg4MhHnLJx3ezPSUfyqmdF93FUa5KTvVWhSxCNhVHkNYw1S58qO91fBJI33ngZBLrsyOY85FcWJX3Y7tI-LC84XEWVEqJesdDSUAyIrPk_llxCm2p9hvP5Yzp-5-xgr0apqpdqmfRXK-Rjn-FY6qS0aM6SVliylzJiQnRBmk91RDM71UXejU_sqShtRGed8IdZsneASmc-zIbkyc_worFPlsrUlJjygx71kca24TjmFxZYLuX5tnhrDgfDRvR2aZWLLXFLpwifx2Fa-7WaT5wCDZ4qAueS) Peter, truth is the enemy of propaganda, and freedom is the enemy of authoritarianism. That’s why I will _never_ stop fighting to hold the CCP accountable, and I know that I can count on you to **[stand with me in this fight.](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=bfe791eeef37413db722a3e9def2ef4d&_e=HC5ROeMRlbA4G7Wa1gWsFEnFatud3PYXYSPLGgNUFvyr8FTw13LyzVrvraAPzlAjsDFo6cTTP5aTd15MiV2AdyaJRTvJ0rLls_glKae72Jp7emaQ_UEiacMbVDcWn95Ph3Kh6Xos8rr5AjyDh4a_Kpql1fI7aqWYyvlg4MhHnLJx3ezPSUfyqmdF93FUa5KTvVWhSxCNhVHkNYw1S58qO91fBJI33ngZBLrsyOY85FezPN1oj_46CqwTbbMukTaQTeTiSChaXNTe3vvZYa0HrPfHdonahRblUdieO_ANM3ZGUwoYsfchXx_MjmLM_UxbkBZ-I7Q9WHjPjUoyemd9N5rgA6jQb9lbKKuLeBsNwDuPCqQF0BkhlAHO6_krKrktawOV2FgBevlXeCIccdymv-JeGRyZ0Te9jCUnnKl9L-ppZTmrjgIprTawoLCL-JSj)** Thank you, Mike Gallagher |

name: Giffords.org
subject: Will you submit a comment on ghost guns?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends —
We’re writing with an important request today — there’s something you can do that will play a meaningful part in the effort to ban ghost guns, firearms that are untraceable and have been used in multiple shootings.
The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) has opened up what they call a public comment period on the use of ghost guns. That means they are asking people to write in online and share their thoughts on the matter.
So far, thousands of people have submitted comments. However, opponents who want to keep ghost guns are currently outpacing us so we need to speak up and make our voices heard.
**So what we need to know is if you’d be willing to share a comment of your own. What do you say, friend?**
[**Click this link and add your name and let us know if you’re willing to submit an online comment on this issue. This is important.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/comment?source=em210706-1-15&t=1&akid=305%2E3935704%2ETBR2jn)
When the comment period closes, the ATF will read through the comments to get a sense of whether or not the public is for or against banning ghost guns. So you can see why this matters so much.
All our best,
Team Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=305%2E3935704%2ETBR2jn) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: I have a new opponent…

| Peter,

Before the holiday weekend, we received breaking news: Another Republican opponent just announced their campaign to defeat me in 2022.

**Last year, my opponent and the outside groups supporting him spent more than $10,000,000 in an attempt to flip this seat. And because my race was so close in 2020, I am once again a top target in 2022. According to the _Washington Post_ , this will "once again be among the most closely watched races."

[_Can you contribute to our campaign as we face a new opponent?_](https://act.myngp.com/el/zavgrRrPftNRhEJO3l7QbyR9x0NWTsQfzu-0r0VcI0Q=/Zx8vh8vI-BEZZnUmbPOWRUlhkHtsKsLrbFlU7RregB0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210706-1-EM&amount=25)**

name: Alex Padilla
subject: re: the Supreme Court
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends ––

Last week, the Supreme Court ruled 6-3 to uphold Arizona voter
restrictions in Brnovich v. Democratic National Committee.

And on the same day, the Court’s conservative majority struck down a
California law promoting transparency for big-money donors to nonprofit
organizations.

These decisions threaten our campaign finance and transparency laws, and
are proof that the Supreme Court has turned their backs on the basic
foundations of our democracy and have allowed discrimination and dark
money to further influence our elections.

These latest decisions undermine the legacy of the Voting Rights Act,
which Congress passed in 1965 to prevent racial discrimination in the
electoral process.

In the six decades since the Voting Rights Act’s enactment, its
protections have proven vital. However, this decision will only embolden
the ongoing Republican-led voter suppression efforts across the country.

The Court's ruling makes it clear: We cannot let up for a moment in the
fight to protect the vote. Congress must act to protect and expand voting
rights for all Americans. And if we are going to succeed I need you with
me:

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/voting_rights//?source=em210706-1-15&t=1001&akid=140%2E159979%2EIMUb-g ]Will you join me and add your name to urge Congress to pass both the
For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act? Our
democracy depends on the voices of the people, and if the Supreme Court
won’t protect them, Congress must.

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/voting_rights//?source=em210706-1-15&t=1002&akid=140%2E159979%2EIMUb-g ]ADD YOUR NAME

It’s become clear recently that our right to vote is increasingly in
danger. So it’s up to us to uphold the fight that John Lewis and so many
others began and secure voting rights for all Americans.

I look forward to working with you on this critical issue,

—Alex

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=140%2E159979%2EIMUb-g

And on the same day, the Court’s conservative majority struck down a California law promoting transparency for big-money donors to nonprofit organizations. These decisions threaten our campaign finance and transparency laws, and are proof that the Supreme Court has turned their backs on the basic foundations of our democracy and have allowed discrimination and dark money to further influence our elections. The path to expanding our Democratic Senate majority runs straight through Wisconsin. _CNN_ reports: "Johnson is the only Republican potentially running for reelection in a state Biden carried last year, so the seat is a top target for Democrats...." That's true, but it doesn't mean we can rest easy.

Biden won in Wisconsin by just over 20,000 votes (or approximately the population of Germantown), and in a midterm election, voter turnout is historically lower -- and historically tough on Democrats.

Sarah Godlewski won two statewide elections in a midterm election -- defeating her Republican opponent by more than 100,000 votes to become Wisconsin’s State Treasurer in 2018 and outperforming almost every Democrat statewide. She has what it takes to beat Ron Johnson, too. But only with your help.

[**Your donation now will help Sarah build a strong campaign that can take on and defeat Ron Johnson, flip Wisconsin, and grow Democrats' majority in the Senate. Chip in $5 right here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31981413/294344389/1714397553?gpsid=31_130_19620&refcode=em21_210706_CNN_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_sl2&utm_campaign=em21_210706_CNN_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_sl2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDYyYjhhYi05YWRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=61Av5gKKz6BYxceVzf9YxDNFdHWjAtD65gUlj5yDad4=)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Ranked #1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Over the holiday weekend, CNN dropped a BIG article about the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210706-1927-header&t=1&akid=1927%2E434096%2EjsozkM)
Peter — check this out:
Over the holiday weekend, CNN dropped a BIG article about the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
_Guess which state was ranked #1?_
**Pennsylvania. 😱** Take a look for yourself:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21733?refcode=em20210706-1927&t=2&akid=1927%2E434096%2EjsozkM)
Believe it or not, Peter, this isn't the first time we've been ranked first in this list. Seriously. There's _already_ consensus that Pennsylvania will be the single-most important Senate seat to flip in 2022.
**That’s why it's absolutely mission-critical that we raise as much money as possible early on to show that John Fetterman is the candidate that can win not just the primary — but also a tough and expensive general election against the PA GOP.**
[**_If you’re in a place to do so, will you make your very first $5 right now to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate? This isn't your average Senate race, Peter, and if you make a contribution to our campaign you'll become a critical part of our grassroots team._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21733?refcode=em20210706-1927&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1927%2E434096%2EjsozkM)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21733?refcode=em20210706-1927&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1927%2E434096%2EjsozkM)**
This is really big news for our strong, honest, and inclusive campaign to lift up all of PA's 67 counties. Let's seize this momentum and win this thing, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
Team Fetterman
P.S. Winning the #1 most likely to flip seat in America is going to take a LOT of support. [** _Click here to donate directly to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate. Any amount you give today will have an immediate impact on the campaign work we can fund _this month.__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21733?refcode=em20210706-1927&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1927%2E434096%2EjsozkM)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210706-1927-footer&t=24&refcode2=1927_434096_jsozkM&akid=1927%2E434096%2EjsozkM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: They won't stop us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
The audit is changing America |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7f44587645&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Original “Election Integrity” Conservative leading the charge against Election Fraud in Arizona via _America’s Audit._

**We have found evidence of untold fraud in the 2020 election, and we are just beginning.**

There are three steps to our plan:
1. Finish America’s Audit in Arizona.
2. Spread America’s Audit to other states, including Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Georgia.
3. Ensure that future elections are protected!

**And the last part is key! None of this matters if the Democrats can do it again!**

_This is why I am writing you today._

**I need to replace the Soros-backed Socialist Katie Hobbs as Secretary of State to ensure we have truer elections in Arizona. Will you help?**

We are making strong fundraising strides, but it is nothing compared to the Socialist Billionaire dollars that back our opponents.

**We are spearheading a tremendous grassroots movement that will defeat the Radical Left. But when it is grassroots versus the Swamp, Crony Billionaires, and Big Tech, we need big dollars.**

**_There is no other way. My campaign has been grassroots from the beginning, and it will ALWAYS be that way!_**

But for us to stay the huge grassroots movement that we have become, that means every donation, great, and small, will help us.

**It also means that we need the help to sustain the momentum, so we can FINISH America’s Audit, we can AUDIT the other states, and we can protect America’s elections from the DEMOCRATS!**

[Will you help me?

_Donate as much as you can to defend America’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ccf0a8a189&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b15d14fb87&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| We are in a fight for our lives for America’s elections.

**Around the country we are seeing the Democrats assault the very foundation of our Democracy.**

**_A ridiculously unjust and evil DOJ assault on the Georgia election laws._**

**_A silencing and attacking of anyone who dares suggest that the 2020 election should be audited!_**

But, friends and patriots, they have tried all of these tactics on me and more, to no avail.

**They have called me crazy. They tried to recall me. They have called me every name in the book and tried to destroy my reputation.**

**_Despite all of these we have led one of the strongest grassroots movements in American history to reclaim America and reclaim our freedoms._**

And we are making so much progress! But we cannot continue without your support!

[_Donate TODAY to save our Democracy from the Radical Left and Election Fraud! This is our last chance!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d1dd3a148b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e5cb6e8550&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **While others remained silent after November 3rd, I stood up to be the vote of the voters. There would not have been a full-day Public Hearing on Election Integrity if I had not stood up to the establishment leaders in Arizona.**

_The establishment wanted to bury the fraud, incompetence, and mismanagement of the 2020 Presidential election in Arizona, but I said NOT ON MY WATCH! I was denied the use of the House of Representative hearing rooms, but we found another venue._

**This was so important that I fronted the cost myself. I am glad that a select group of legislators had the courage to join me and pursue the truth knowing they would face ridicule and harassment. We listened to our constituents when others blew them off.**

**_So do you want a Secretary of State that listens to constituents, gives them a voice in the process, and takes action or one who was part of the problem?_**

You have seen the attacks against me and you have seen what I have done.

**If I can do all of this as a representative in the Arizona House, imagine what I could do as Secretary of State?**

_My heart is on the table. I have bled for Election Integrity, and I will continue the fight no matter what!_

For our children, for our grandchildren.

**To all the Democrats who want to steal our Freedoms away from us, I have one thing to say.**

**_Not on my watch._**

_[Will you help me fight back?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=39b5a8821b&e=44b8c466b0)_

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am the true grassroots Election Integrity Conservative.**

**_[We may not succeed without your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8dfb50f493&e=44b8c466b0)_**

[_Donate as much as you can to save our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=12800e0287&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3fb14da653&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2a28f5b0a2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=ae48add3d2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=ae48add3d2).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Stand up to Criminals
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Punish the criminals |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e79d4a36ce&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I'm tired of Biden using the crises HE CREATES to take away our rights.

His dementia is becoming dangerous. He is making our lives worse, every single day!

It's time the Republicans in Congress started fighting him- and I will do it when I get to Congress!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a321c17b3c&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District. It's currently held by worthless Democrat Darren Soto, who voted to go easy on criminals and take away guns from law abiding Americans. **

We HAVE to defeat him!

Biden can't stop himself. He refuses stubbornly to prosecute criminals, instead choosing to go after law-abiding citizens who arm themselves against the criminals Biden is allying himself with.

Between his "crime strategy" and his open border policies, Joe Biden is the criminal's best friend!

_President Biden in remarks Wednesday said his crime prevention strategy would focus on strengthening background checks, banning assault weapons and high-capacity magazines, and boosting community policing.

Biden met with state and local leaders and law enforcement officials ahead of his remarks to talk crime prevention strategy, amid a surge in violence in cities across the U.S.

Both Biden and Attorney General Merrick Garland, who spoke before him, pointed to a historic rise in crime in the summertime, and said that rise "may be more pronounced" as the nation comes out of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**The White House has insisted curbing gun violence is key to tamping down a "staggering" surge of crime across the U.S. **

"Talk to most responsible gun owners they'll tell you there's no possible justification for having 100 rounds in a magazine," Biden said. _

This demented fool actually thinks if you take ammo away from lawful gun owners, it will stop crime. He's either a liar, a fool, or both.

**_I think he's both. _**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6ea24d1d09&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**We need to do better than this! One plan I like is to re-fund the police, with 100,000 more police on the streets this year. FOX News reports:**__

_Sen. Josh Hawley, R-Mo., on Wednesday introduced legislation to hire 100,000 new police officers across the U.S. and boost optimism among police and communities.

The bill would provide federal grants to locales to boost new police hires; increase penalties for assaulting federal officers by 50%; develop programs to protect the private information judges, prosecutors, and law enforcement officials; extend concealed carry rights to federal judges and prosecutors; increase service programs for federal officers; and more.

"It's absolutely vital that we keep American families safe. That is the bottom line, and right now, too many Americans aren't. Why aren't they? Because ... violent crime is up by over 30% in cities across the country," Hawley said Wednesday on "America's Newsroom" "Unfortunately, that includes my home state of Missouri. _We need more cops. We shouldn't be defunding the police. We should be supporting them_."_

I'll vote for that! More cops please, and let us keep our guns and ammo!

Biden gets everything wrong. He thinks we should support criminals and lawbreakers and punish the citizens. I think the opposite.

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda, making America safe again. I will bring Florida's successes to Capitol Hill!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. _I am the guy he's scared of, he wants NO part of seeing me again because our district is trending Red- like our state!

[This is the year to take it back!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0557e9920b&e=afa21b7626)_

I have a goal I must meet by Wednesday at midnight. I need to raise $40,000 but I'm still $4900 short. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=54383318fd&e=afa21b7626)

The Dems must go! [Help me make America safe again!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=42d0b03e4f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=182650be79&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=bc27620d87&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=191cd0ee06&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542

Peter,

For 11 years, I proudly wore the American flag on my arm as a member of the Army’s Special Operations Command. During each of my seven deployments, Old Glory was a constant companion; every morning that I woke up, **the American flag was one of the first things I set my eyes on** – at the end of the day, our flag was one of the last things I would look at before going to sleep.

**I wore the stars and stripes proudly as my team and I hunted the Islamic terrorists who attacked the American compound in Benghazi and killed Ambassador Chris Stevens**.

So, when I recently read in the paper that Olympic athlete Gwen Berry turned away from the American flag after qualifying to represent the United States in Tokyo later this month, **it made my blood boil**.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=53682fb002344ab3a94e9e9c40666856&_e=YlyZzXHehUWBBfNGC5-EqnRGYlvpNJnlrPlxjA_7zNodcBdpLlTyw6roa1duALl0b2T7hcK_XpuXB-AJPUWcypHeB_OebpWQYLxHeLNVlqozBlunfCW5QsCDiHSzperYCsIK-gWvs7TjH3nlENOkeAACKhcJtjVh-7ok-4-edE4lbxsGepeGZtv1xopVJGY8Qj5pfhb7JrIik8RkTnWImlcvNmIkoMDxC_Ka_3fQGrTZD221Kne7zsM7XEXqKpWJI_EhlocxDo9TdxMKm8GaWieyaOmHVBLhFtrxxvWok266tyhExWifOqM9hpJ9JGX-BWjsrw8-aLbPWjoHkvCQukGyTsl7upfVSyfXDVNjI3G_n11vOu2jR_AYhZJgOni9Cr5WCx9t9aFV3Sjclxxm2d6KcgH8R7rZd10-ZkJKIXxUMK7OYUMO22jadWsbmNCWTBldrQb1Fjm2dlMywGQbvtvKI7oHCfpDx5ur5t__G-rRVnuYhlwUPV5gBOjVmkwyXBpA9Z766Xur85aaCiQPkg%3D%3D)
_Gwen Berry turning her back to the American flag following Olympic trials on June 26th_
**[This morning, I had an idea and I’m hoping you’ll chip in a few dollars to help me out](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=53682fb002344ab3a94e9e9c40666856&_e=YlyZzXHehUWBBfNGC5-EqnRGYlvpNJnlrPlxjA_7zNodcBdpLlTyw6roa1duALl0b2T7hcK_XpuXB-AJPUWcypHeB_OebpWQYLxHeLNVlqozBlunfCW5QsCDiHSzperYCsIK-gWvs7TjH3nlENOkeAACKhcJtjVh-7ok-4-edE4lbxsGepeGZtv1xopVJGY8Qj5pfhb7JrIik8RkTnWImlcvNmIkoMDxC_Ka_3fQGrTZD221Kne7zsM7XEXqKpWJI_EhlocxDo9TdxMKm8GaWieyaOmHVBLhFtrxxvWok266tyhExWifOqM9hpJ9JGX-eNJ0vTHDsL8EGo5-Hr-AeMgJtZvTruS3hpvCWaS-7njpGWJYMq37fl2PfVvU2Fv6cu2r3iWY3ieIK6eQjsGg-4qDTJCSjP_QO11tlOKRnPcE5UNdaIkuzXAuNMYpdPYqQxSRwdX9R0AiH-P1XkrkhPvTIytaud1SlULOmMp2TPiOlLgNMh_NbjqK9jYCEljF48jwv9gOtX8IPeQcO7dm1g%3D%3D)**. If Ms. Berry wants to turn her back to the American flag, let’s send as many American flags as money can buy to the United States Olympic Committee in her name. I can buy a flag from a veteran owned flag manufacturer for $2.40. **[For every donation of $5 more to my campaign, I’ll send an American Flag to Gwen Berry](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=53682fb002344ab3a94e9e9c40666856&_e=YlyZzXHehUWBBfNGC5-EqnRGYlvpNJnlrPlxjA_7zNodcBdpLlTyw6roa1duALl0b2T7hcK_XpuXB-AJPUWcypHeB_OebpWQYLxHeLNVlqozBlunfCW5QsCDiHSzperYCsIK-gWvs7TjH3nlENOkeAACKhcJtjVh-7ok-4-edE4lbxsGepeGZtv1xopVJGY8Qj5pfhb7JrIik8RkTnWImlcvNmIkoMDxC_Ka_3fQGrTZD221Kne7zsM7XEXqKpWJI_EhlocxDo9TdxMKm8GaWieyaOmHVBLhFtrxxvWok266tyhExWifOqM9hpJ9JGX-zr01iBK6H12xUp1PTAqfjaHJcCt45SB5jMYDBnSSGzKm1U3rGEZKBCKQqKh1yrmRveKLenRu5HLBH7MpMQU_coiDSC7hjhaFp7Mc29QxjyyjPmwRWCgeAPb1HkWFgpuquStaRVSQOIKGuZ-YLF4V8hQkBanNCBbpFelBygzbGXkqYBIc9vrLdPpcyPKZXuv00qih6GE44ilLiStGnGdn3w%3D%3D)**.

As a Targeting officer within the Intelligence Community, I _**proudly**_ wore the stars and stripes on my right arm as my team and I hunted and neutralized terrorists on the Arabian Peninsula, terrorists who were hired by Iran to wreak havoc on freedom-loving people everywhere.

My name is John Castorani. I’m a proud veteran, father, husband, and most important of all: I’m a proud American. **I love this country so damn much that I left a career in the intelligence community to run for Congress, because honestly, just look at the people representing us right now.**

The United States is far from a perfect country, but we’re a country constantly in a state of improvement. _**Imagine if an athlete from China pulled such a stunt? They would be arrested**_.

I’ll leave you with one last thought today. I worked alongside the FBIs Hostage Recovery team to recover a US citizen being held captive in the African country of Uganda, and I can only imagine the pure sense of joy and relief the individual experienced when they caught a glimpse of the American flag on our right arms and heard the words “ _**We’re from the United States, and we’re here to take you home**_.”

I hope Ms. Berry realizes how ironic it is that only in the United States could an Olympic athlete turn their back on the American flag, then be welcomed home without punishment.

We owe everything we have to the United States, however imperfect of a country we are. We’re so fortunate to call ourselves Americans.

**[I hope you’ll help me send Gwen Berry as many American flags as money can buy, we can’t let her forget who she is going to representing at the Olympics in Tokyo this month](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=53682fb002344ab3a94e9e9c40666856&_e=YlyZzXHehUWBBfNGC5-EqnRGYlvpNJnlrPlxjA_7zNodcBdpLlTyw6roa1duALl0b2T7hcK_XpuXB-AJPUWcypHeB_OebpWQYLxHeLNVlqozBlunfCW5QsCDiHSzperYCsIK-gWvs7TjH3nlENOkeAACKhcJtjVh-7ok-4-edE4lbxsGepeGZtv1xopVJGY8Qj5pfhb7JrIik8RkTnWImlcvNmIkoMDxC_Ka_3fQGrTZD221Kne7zsM7XEXqKpWJI_EhlocxDo9TdxMKm8GaWieyaOmHVBLhFtrxxvWok266tyhExWifOqM9hpJ9JGX-H933E2RC9_ciIuWMY1oR-09i0doZMKBRgcfba2sugCI6C4X9AxlmnV-kXW3uBQw2NUiOJ4pe1-rDgOcod70x6RppDkab0eUM0diE8kDsyfFdXa_0UeoTxDVbvBaWeSFIRQAHdZeWB5ITrQxhJwYtz3qMRtNeoUlIudfv6JD8pxyUsQr8lTVfIcaiXey2yvlYs0FAaSnu5WEAg6E_ehHriQ%3D%3D)**.

[**STAND WITH ME AND OLD GLORY
SEND A FLAG TO GWEN BERRY ** **› › **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=53682fb002344ab3a94e9e9c40666856&_e=YlyZzXHehUWBBfNGC5-EqnRGYlvpNJnlrPlxjA_7zNodcBdpLlTyw6roa1duALl0b2T7hcK_XpuXB-AJPUWcypHeB_OebpWQYLxHeLNVlqozBlunfCW5QsCDiHSzperYCsIK-gWvs7TjH3nlENOkeAACKhcJtjVh-7ok-4-edE4lbxsGepeGZtv1xopVJGY8Qj5pfhb7JrIik8RkTnWImlcvNmIkoMDxC_Ka_3fQGrTZD221Kne7zsM7XEXqKpWJI_EhlocxDo9TdxMKm8GaWieyaOmHVBLhFtrxxvWok266tyhExWifOqM9hpJ9JGX-bIIZd_4lUWX95rj1K9kzOPJnfHH6N6uUc415q-3NzKc9MqMvlD0xWVnKekj9DVwFT_Dw17j0evhF-XC8IrisAHnzxP1mXIVqCwnvn_VTK7jBjbZNK7cJjFhpMJC7rh9dsJUKVeeF-RUWy9Vt9bAyZSOBpHU4fwQLyxMeXB64Q2YINzPGQTUi3AK5ErbSR23-oqD_MZtzwfWAmQBRfLjZnQ%3D%3D)
