---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=8ac8efa7d5&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter, You know you’re over the target when the phony corporate press is outraged over your statements. The Washington Post wants you to believe its fake narrative about January 6, which is why one of its “reporters” is upset over an email I sent recently: Senior Airman Ashli Babbitt _was_ executed in cold blood. She was executed on video. We all saw it. And there _are_ reports that the FBI may have played a role in the events of January 6: Now that we’ve cleared that up for the propagandists at The Washington Post, I need your help. [**Sign my “Justice for Ashli Babbitt” petition today, and help me get to the bottom of her death, and the events leading up to it**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4dcea16417&e=645b3b1338). [**With your signature, you’re helping me stand up to the powerful entities in Washington who want you to believe the “violent insurrection” narrative, and nothing else**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7f20542488&e=645b3b1338). Some hyperpartisan members of Congress even established a 9/11 style commission to investigate the events of the day -- but it’s run by Democrats and Liz Cheney, a dishonest hack whose entire family has been a disaster for this country. All of the people on the commission voted to impeach President Trump. We already know that they believe President Trump and his supporters are guilty, and that they’re to blame. How are we supposed to trust their investigation? **We can’t.** Their goal is to link the America First movement to violence and “domestic terrorism.” **[That’s why I need you to support my efforts by signing my “Justice for Ashli Babbitt” petition today](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f838093b0e&e=645b3b1338). ** [**If I have to, I’ll fight by myself to ensure the truth about Ashli Babbitt’s death and the truth about January 6 is delivered to her family and to the American people, and your signature on my petition is key to helping me do just that**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=81dee18246&e=645b3b1338). Our petition has been an immense success. We have gathered THOUSANDS of signatures from Patriots like you, all across America. But we’re not done yet -- I still need your support. **After you sign the petition, make sure to forward this message to all of your patriotic friends and family, and ask them to sign the petition too**. [**While you’re at it, I’m asking you to chip into my reelection campaign**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e12d9cc422&e=645b3b1338). By daring to question the official narrative, I have become a top target for the Communist Democrats and the despicable RINOs. [**Your support today -- whatever amount you can give -- is crucial to helping me get reelected, so I can continue to ask the questions that nobody else will and hold the powerful accountable on your behalf**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=dde9ae54fd&e=645b3b1338). Thank you in advance for signing my petition and helping me seek justice.
---
| Yours in the fight, [](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=348ac31bb3&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District

subject: The Party Is Here Tour 📣
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
Peter,
We are launching The Party Is Here Tour [https://tndp.org/tour/] , an engagement campaign and action-oriented tour to bring more people into the Party by visiting regions of the state all summer long.
https://tndp.org/tour/ [https://tndp.org/tour/]
We’ll kick off our tour in Chattanooga this Saturday where we’ll hold a rally with community members, meet with folks to discuss the issues that matter most, and register new voters. If you're in the area, join us by registering here [https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/399310/] .
It’s going to take all of us to Build Back Blue together, and we’re going to get it done by bringing a new wave of engagement, development, fundraising, and training.
So join us when we come to your neck of the woods and show your Democratic pride by WEARING BLUE.
Look forward to seeing you,
Hendrell Remus
Chair, Tennesse Democratic Party

| | Peter, we just lost another state. As of last week, Georgia's Jim Crow 2.0 with all of its nastiness is now law. This bill closes polling locat ions, cuts polling times, and cracks down on the rights of many \-- particularly marginalized people and people of color \-- to have free and fair access to the ballot box. **But Stacey knows how to fight back. She's already helped Democrats win decisive victories in Texas, where Democrats walked out of the legislative chamber to deny quorum, effectively killing Greg Abbott's landmark attack on voting rights in that state.** | **[DONATE TO JOIN STACEY ABRAMS' FIGHT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31983174/294350372/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210706_GEN_FDR_I&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmOTM5NDU2LWExZGUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HVvzebPiMe5QZ8CtDC61n_znVLh0hswLypxZjNGOJEI=)**

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Introducing my plan to save our sacred democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friends,

Today, I went to Gettysburg, Pennslyvania to address the crisis our democracy is in and lay out my eight-part plan to save it.

I know it's long, but it would mean so much to me if you could read my speech and chip in to help me take this plan to the floor of the U.S. Senate.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31983357/294350754/-353695395?refcode2=d5533549-a2de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210706-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTUzMzU0OS1hMmRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRNBmzy1gQvsqln1C-gU3jMUmtXPSlZF4gCuT9MJE3Q=)**
* * *
Five score and fifty-eight years ago, an American President stood on these hallowed grounds speaking to a divided country at a moment of crisis.

He spoke of a nation conceived in liberty and in the prospect that all people were created equal.

Today I stand on that same battlefield, addressing our great Commonwealth and nation at a similar moment of crisis. A point of inflection.

My fellow Pennsylvanians — our democracy is under attack, and like 158 years ago, it faces a threat from within.

This cold civil war calls upon us to harden our resolve and protect the sacred gift of self-governance paid for with blood, right where we stand.

The forces seeking to dissolve the bonds of our national union are no longer armed with cannon and bayonet; they are now armed with conspiracies and lies.

Six months ago today, the world watched a bloody and brutal insurrection unfold, stoked by a defeated President and his supporters, in a doomed attempt to disrupt the peaceful transfer of power — the bedrock of our democratic republic.

Let’s be clear — these attacks were not just aimed at a building but at the very foundation of our government, our society — this was a direct assault on our democracy itself.

But these broadsides did not end on January 6th. They’ve continued unabated until this very day.

While we no longer see active storming of federal buildings the theatre of combat has shifted to legislatures, the courts and to the hearts and minds of voters across the country.

The opponents to free and fair elections push regressive proposals that degrade trust in the sanctity of the vote.

Trafficking in misinformation and disinformation, they’ve utilized every tool at their disposal to make it more difficult for citizens to be a part of the democratic process — especially those that they think threaten their power.

We see again and again that the opponents of democracy are trying to lock out the voices of young people. They are trying to lock out the voices of people of color and people of conscience.

They are trying to lock out the chorus of change that is calling us to make the American promise accessible to all — because if we vote, they lose.

In Harrisburg, I serve as the Democratic chair of the State Government Committee’s subcommittee on Campaign Finance and Elections as well as the co-chair of the Pennsylvania Legislative Black Caucus’ committee of Voting and Democracy.

I’ve been on the front lines of protecting the right to vote and protecting our democratic experiment.

I’ve faced head-on some of the worst actors in the battle to keep our republic.

I’ve been unequivocal in defense of the right for all Pennsylvanians, regardless of party to be able to vote as easily as possible.

And in response, the Republican majority has tried to shut me up. They’ve threatened to throw me out. They’ve turned off my mic. They’ve gone as far as to strike my comments from the record, but you can’t strike the truth.

It is not lost on me as a Black man, as a descendant of the enslaved, that the outcome of the pivotal battle fought here — and the genesis of the conflict — held, at its core, the question of my very humanity and that of my ancestors.

It is not lost on me that the battle in which we are currently embroiled has, at its core, similar questions.

Will we have a democracy? And will it work for working people, for marginalized people, the forgotten and the left behind?

The fate of our democracy is the fate of all of our freedoms and our inheritance of the American promise. A promise each generation pulls us closer to fully realize.

Just Sunday, we celebrated Independence Day and fifteen days before that, Juneteenth.

On July 4th, we celebrate the birth of our nation and the idea that all people are created equal and the establishment of our national ideals of freedom, justice and fairness.

But Juneteenth stands as a reminder that we’ve fallen short of those ideals and still struggle to cast off the weight of structural racism.

This past Saturday, dozens of white supremacists marched in Philadelphia filled with hatred and chanting the same bile heard in Charlottesville.

As news spread of their presence in the city, I was reminded of a conversation I’d had with my grandmother two years ago.

She called me with pain in her voice and tears in her eyes: _“I’m sorry baby, I’m so sorry, baby. I thought we had fixed some of this stuff and here you are talking about the same things.”_

I refuse to have to have that conversation with my grandkids. All of us should refuse.

Our mission, our patriotic duty, must be to make the prescient words of our founding documents real in our lifetime. That is why today I’m laying out my vision for a new day in American democracy.

This eight part agenda is critical to securing our democracy now and into the future.

It’s been famously said that: _“An educated citizenry is a vital requisite for our survival as a free people.”_

That is why at the cornerstone of my vision and the first bill I will introduce once I’m elected to the U.S. Senate is the creation of a Civilian Democracy Corps, housed under AmeriCorps, to reinvigorate the teaching of civic education and how to spot misinformation and disinformation.

Around the world America is engaged in the painstaking work of aiding new democracies in their development, but we must also do that work here at home.

These Civilian Democracy Corps members would go all across the country and work with schools, nonprofits, and community organizations to teach civic education to folks of all ages.

If we’re going to have a Democracy, we have to continually educate our people about how it works.

We must also reckon with the fact that monopolistic tech and media companies have raked in enormous amounts of money as misinformation and disinformation have run rampant on their platforms — it is a national security threat we must address head on.

Second, I renew my call to end the Jim Crow Filibuster. The filibuster enables a minority of Senators to block legislation supported by the majority.

Our government derives its power from us, and the filibuster has been used repeatedly to silence us and block movement on vital legislation overwhelmingly supported by the American people.

The filibuster is not sacred, but voting is, equality is, justice is.

With the filibuster gone, we must pass HR1, better known as the For the People Act.

It's a comprehensive set of reforms to voting and elections that would make voting dramatically easier, remove the ability of states to enact the voter suppression measures that have been proliferated in recent years, end partisan gerrymandering, and take on the poison of dark money in our politics.

Big corporations and their “elected employees” have been able to drown out the voices of everyday people from the political process and it must end. Just last week, the Supreme Court made the problem even worse and HR1 must be the response.

American heroes like John Lewis, who was beaten and bled to preserve and expand the right to vote, represent the best of us. But we must do more than praise his legacy and the legacy of those whom he marched alongside, we must pass The John Lewis Voting Rights Act.

This bill would re-enact the 1965 Voting Rights Act, one of the most important pieces of legislation ever passed by Congress.

The Supreme Court, led by radical conservative justices, has again and again taken a hammer to the core tenants of the VRA and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act would secure them. But the rightwing activist nature of our federal courts bears our attention.

To save the courts, we must expand the courts. Let me be clear, it was Mitch McConnell ignoring the constitution and his own made up precedent that packed the court.

We need to expand the Supreme Court as has been done multiple times to rebalance the scales of justice. Senate Republican packing of the court has made it deeply politicized and responsive almost solely to big corporate interests and the Federalist Society.

I know there are those who say disrupting Senate tradition by ending the filibuster or by expanding the Supreme Court risks breaking the very body I desperately want to fix.

But the truth is, the Senate is already deeply broken and the only tradition we risk disrupting is the tight grip of power wielded by an ever-contracting group of well-off and well-connected interests that benefit from the status quo.

Senator McConnell has made it clear that, if he regains control of the Senate, he will not allow President Biden to fill a vacancy prior to 2024, should there be an opening.

This, after refusing to confirm President Obama’s nominee and filing the seat of Justice Ginsburg 17 days before an election. Mitch has plainly said, he is 100% focused on blocking the President’s agenda and the filibuster and a radical activist court are his tools of choice.

As Maya Angelou said: _“When someone shows you who they are, believe them the first time.”_

We must disarm him of his tools of obstruction. Period.

The current status quo has done nothing more than silence voices that must be heard. That’s why today I reaffirm my unwavering commitment to D.C. Statehood and to self-determination for Puerto Rico.

Finally, to move forward we can’t ignore the past — or we are doomed to repeat it.

Last week, I introduced state legislation to create an annual day of remembrance on January 6 to be known as "Democracy Observance Day."

All Americans and Pennsylvanians must remember January 6 as a day that shook the foundations of our democratic republic.

Democracy is fragile and we all have a duty to protect it in the face of conspiracy theories, lies, and violence.

Securing our democracy is about securing a future for working families.

Protecting the right to vote goes hand in hand with making sure that Democracy actually works for working people.

When we think about our Democracy, it’s more than just voting.

It’s about all the different ways we make our voices heard. It’s about making folks' voices heard in the workplace so they can have better wages, protections and good benefits.

It’s about people being able to peacefully protest without fear of being harmed at the hands of law enforcement.

It’s about using our collective voices to speak up about the dueling crises of climate change, debt, gun violence and fully funded schools.

In his first inaugural address President Lincoln said:

_“We are not enemies, but friends. We must not be enemies. Though passion may have strained it, it must not break our bonds of affection. The mystic chords of memory, stretching from every battlefield and patriot grave to every living heart and hearthstone all over this broad land, will yet swell the chorus of the Union, when again touched, as surely they will be, by the better angels of our nature."_

As we stand here at Gettysburg, we reflect on the fact that every time we’ve seen America at an inflection point such as this — every time we’ve seen America choose those better angels of our nature — we’ve also seen a new generation of leadership calling for change.

A new generation that’s unafraid to rise up and call America higher. A new generation demanding we live out the words of our creed.

On July 4th, 2017, as fireworks exploded overhead, my mother Kelly took her last breath. But the wisdom she left me with is forever imprinted on my heart.

She’d say: “ _Nobody can do everything, but everybody can do something.”_

Those words serve as an indelible reminder that democracy requires something of us — every single one of us.

It required the ultimate sacrifice of so many men who gave their lives on this consecrated ground to preserve the union.

It required something on the enslaved and abolitionists who risked everything to chart a path to freedom.

It required something of the suffragettes who rightly believed that they were created equal, too.

It required something of the heroes who sat at diner counters while being spit on and lambasted, fighting off dogs and water hoses because they knew a change was going to come.

It required something of the brave souls who fought back at Stone Wall for the right to pursue their happiness.

It requires something of us now.

In this fight we must not grow weary, we must not give up, and we must not fail.

God bless you, God protect our troops, and God bless the great Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.

— Malcolm
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31983358/294350763/-353695395?refcode2=d5533549-a2de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210706-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTUzMzU0OS1hMmRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRNBmzy1gQvsqln1C-gU3jMUmtXPSlZF4gCuT9MJE3Q=)**

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC
---
Malcolm PAC
PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d4533549-a2de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/d5533549-a2de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTUzMzU0OS1hMmRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRNBmzy1gQvsqln1C-gU3jMUmtXPSlZF4gCuT9MJE3Q=&id=120380453) to unsubscribe. By submitting your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic campaign updates from Malcolm PAC. Msg & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info, STOP to stop receiving messages.

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Help us make this slow month a major success!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
This month is important for us. We have to continue growing our support as we venture into the summer months, which are notoriously slow for fundraising.
**This is especially crucial because One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking Mark. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.**
They will stop at nothing to attack what Mark and our campaign stand for. They want to try to stop our momentum because they know we can’t afford to lose a single seat in the Senate.
**So we’re coming to you to help us make this slow month a major success, which is why we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our goals and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210706-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=911_6688874_KJTnVt&akid=911%2E6688874%2EKJTnVt)

As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. So we can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far.

name: Team Warner
subject: Mark Warner, the “dealmaker-in-chief”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
He was proud to help negotiate the bipartisan infrastructure agreement.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31983698/294351630/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjI5OGY2ZS1hM2RlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOblQhWNRx3haahQJ8CBiEiQUTzq_2ocaDbTjB2ejzk=&emci=b555fdc4-93de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2f298f6e-a3de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | | **“Mark Warner emerges as moderates’
dealmaker-in-chief” — Axios**
---
Derek,

Mark Warner was proud to help negotiate the bipartisan agreement on infrastructure between the White House, Senate Democrats, and Senate Republicans.

He’s fully committed to modernizing our nation’s aging infrastructure, creating millions of good-paying jobs, and ensuring America can remain competitive in the global economy.

**[Derek, if you’re able, will you make a quick donation to keep Mark’s legislative victories going strong in 2021 and beyond? He’s ready to roll up his sleeves and score more bipartisan wins for Virginians.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31983699/294351631/928844790?refcode=ris_20210706_e_f_us_na_na_dealmakernd&refcode2=ask1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjI5OGY2ZS1hM2RlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOblQhWNRx3haahQJ8CBiEiQUTzq_2ocaDbTjB2ejzk=)**

The new infrastructure blueprint Mark Warner helped negotiate includes:
* **$110 billion** to repair our roads and bridges.
* **$66 billion** to modernize Amtrak and expand rail service.
* **$65 billion** to deliver affordable, high-speed internet to Americans (including the 700,000 Virginians who lack access to broadband internet).
* **$48.5 billion** to repair and expand public transit.
* **$47 billion **to help communities like Hampton Roads harden their infrastructure against future impacts of climate change.
* **$25 billion** to upgrade airports and $16.3 billion for ports — like our very own Port of Virginia.
* **$21 billion** for environmental cleanup projects.

The agreement also provides billions in funding to upgrade water pipes, electric vehicle infrastructure, power grids, and more.

**_Make no mistake: This blueprint represents the largest long-term investment in American infrastructure in almost a century!_**

This is a critical moment, so Mark Warner is determined to work together with his Republican and Democratic colleagues in the Senate to ensure this blueprint passes both chambers of Congress and lands on President Biden’s desk for his urgent signature.

**[Please consider pitching in to help Mark continue delivering bipartisan wins for Virginians in the U.S. Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31983700/294351632/928844790?refcode=ris_20210706_e_f_us_na_na_dealmakernd&refcode2=ask1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjI5OGY2ZS1hM2RlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOblQhWNRx3haahQJ8CBiEiQUTzq_2ocaDbTjB2ejzk=)**

Thank you,
Team Warner

name: Erica Smith
subject: My trip to Washington, D.C.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Shortly after we blockaded the White House, Secret Service agents started showing up.
#
Hi, it’s Erica.
While watching the fireworks over the weekend, I realized that I owe you an important campaign update about how **I nearly got arrested in Washington, D.C. for peacefully protesting a few days ago.**
I’ll tell you the whole story, but first, [**_is there any chance you could please send your first $5 donation to our campaign? I’m counting on your support._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4058?refcode=em20210706-238&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=238%2E3698%2E4aOHlh)
Though we’re in the middle of our 100 Counties 100 Days Tour, I knew that the right thing to do was follow a group of young, southern Sunrise Movement activists to D.C. The moment called for direct action.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4058?refcode=em20210706-238&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=238%2E3698%2E4aOHlh)
Our mission was to send a clear message to President Biden before it’s too late: No climate, no infrastructure deal. **We marched to the White House to demand that the American Jobs Plan include a bold jobs and climate package that includes a fully funded Civilian Climate Corps (CCC).**
The CCC is a visionary policy that would create a government jobs program aimed at combating the climate crisis. It would give good, green jobs to the millions of Americans who are out of work or underemployed. And it would do a LOT of good in North Carolina, where the climate crisis takes a daily toll on the lives and livelihoods for our working families.
**Over 500 people, mostly youth activists, participated in the direct action outside the White House.** This includes a whole bus full of activists from Sunrise Movement North Carolina! I am so grateful for their leadership.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4058?refcode=em20210706-238&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=238%2E3698%2E4aOHlh)
The direct action escalated as planned when activists began blockading all 10 entrances to the White House. Everyone was chanting, waving signs, and holding banners. You could really feel the energy of people making their voices heard for the air we breathe, for the water we drink, and for the place we call home!
But shortly after we blockaded the entrances, Secret Service agents started showing up. **They began arresting people at one of the 10 White House entrances!**
For several moments, it was pure chaos. As Secret Service members began approaching the entrance I was helping to blockade with other activists, **I imagined that I would soon be in handcuffs, like so many other activists who marched to the White House to peacefully protest...**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4058?refcode=em20210706-238&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=238%2E3698%2E4aOHlh)
...but in the end, Secret Service moved on from my entrance as our crowd of activists dispersed. Of course, that didn’t stop them from arresting dozens of protesters in total that day.
Arrest or no arrest, **I will never stop fighting for bold climate reform and climate justice.** Our lives and livelihoods cannot be sold out for the sake of a compromise that leaves our planet on fire and our economy rigged.
If elected to the U.S. Senate, I will keep raising my voice unapologetically to combat the climate crisis every way we can. **After all, I am the ONLY candidate in this primary who supports a Green New Deal.** But the only way we'll get there is by raising a lot of money online so that we have the resources to win.

clean_body: Shortly after we blockaded the White House, Secret Service agents started showing up. Hi, it’s Erica. While watching the fireworks over the weekend, I realized that I owe you an important campaign update about how I nearly got arrested in Washington, D.C. for peacefully protesting a few days ago. I’ll tell you the whole story, but first, Though we’re in the middle of our 100 Counties 100 Days Tour, I knew that the right thing to do was follow a group of young, southern Sunrise Movement activists to D.C. The moment called for direct action. Our mission was to send a clear message to President Biden before it’s too late: No climate, no infrastructure deal. We marched to the White House to demand that the American Jobs Plan include a bold jobs and climate package that includes a fully funded Civilian Climate Corps (CCC). The CCC is a visionary policy that would create a government jobs program aimed at combating the climate crisis. It would give good, green jobs to the millions of Americans who are out of work or underemployed. And it would do a LOT of good in North Carolina, where the climate crisis takes a daily toll on the lives and livelihoods for our working families. Over 500 people, mostly youth activists, participated in the direct action outside the White House. This includes a whole bus full of activists from Sunrise Movement North Carolina! I am so grateful for their leadership. The direct action escalated as planned when activists began blockading all 10 entrances to the White House. Everyone was chanting, waving signs, and holding banners. You could really feel the energy of people making their voices heard for the air we breathe, for the water we drink, and for the place we call home! But shortly after we blockaded the entrances, Secret Service agents started showing up. They began arresting people at one of the 10 White House entrances! For several moments, it was pure chaos. As Secret Service members began approaching the entrance I was helping to blockade with other activists, I imagined that I would soon be in handcuffs, like so many other activists who marched to the White House to peacefully protest... ...but in the end, Secret Service moved on from my entrance as our crowd of activists dispersed. Of course, that didn’t stop them from arresting dozens of protesters in total that day. Arrest or no arrest, I will never stop fighting for bold climate reform and climate justice. Our lives and livelihoods cannot be sold out for the sake of a compromise that leaves our planet on fire and our economy rigged. If elected to the U.S. Senate, I will keep raising my voice unapologetically to combat the climate crisis every way we can. After all, I am the ONLY candidate in this primary who supports a Green New Deal. But the only way we'll get there is by raising a lot of money online so that we have the resources to win. Thank you for being in this fight with me, Erica Erica Smith for U.S. Senate Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

subject: re: the Delta Variant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |

---
Peter, the COVID hysteria has already gone on too long...

And these power-hungry bureaucrats don't want to let go!

That's probably why we're hearing a lot about this new _spooky_ "delta variant."

**Don 't let the fear mongers win. New public England study of delta variant shows 44 deaths out of 53,822 (.08%) in the unvaccinated group.**

We must stand strong on the side of science and refuse to allow another lockdown, more regulation, and more useless rules.

If you ask me, enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight.
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57883309:6QL5zclAN:m:1:3253819041:C5784AD6DF1AC3BBD6CFFB758984ECA3:r)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57883310:6QL5zclAN:m:1:3253819041:C5784AD6DF1AC3BBD6CFFB758984ECA3:r)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57883311:6QL5zclAN:m:1:3253819041:C5784AD6DF1AC3BBD6CFFB758984ECA3:r)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57883312:6QL5zclAN:m:1:3253819041:C5784AD6DF1AC3BBD6CFFB758984ECA3:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**
Peter, if we allow this nonsense of the "safety at all costs" narrative to continue, we're never going to be a free country again.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy a power-hungry bureaucrat. EVER.

We cannot allow our country to be shut down and our businesses destroyed over an illness most healthy individuals will recover from.

No matter what "variant" they're trying to scare us with, freedom must prevail.

That's why I'm putting my foot down. I will not believe the hype.

I refuse to allow this chaos to become permanent, Peter.

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57883308:6QL5zclAN:m:1:3253819041:C5784AD6DF1AC3BBD6CFFB758984ECA3:r)

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: We won’t let this happen again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31984988/294355649/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2YzNTQ1Mi1hOGRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k59dQYM71QWN4CXY0xqFr_xsO8uCiHLxvGT-5A1HUbU=)

| | Friends, Half a year ago, a mob incited by President Trump’s lies desecrated our nation’s Capitol in an attempt to overturn the results of a legitimate presidential election. They tried to burn down our country, but they did not succeed. Congress did its duty to certify the electoral college results -- the will of the more than 80 million Americans who turned out to elect President Biden prevailed. But the January 6th attack left an open wound that our nation cannot heal from until we have taken steps to strengthen our democracy and ensure it can never happen again. Republican lawmakers across the nation are mobilizing to restrict access to the ballot after historic turnout from voters of color last election. The**John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** would restore the full strength of the Voting Rights Act to end racial gerrymandering and stop states from engaging in racist voter suppression tactics. We must take action to ensure that every American can participate in our democracy and have their voices heard. [**Sign on to call on Congress to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act immediately!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31984989/294355650/-566338592?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2YzNTQ1Mi1hOGRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k59dQYM71QWN4CXY0xqFr_xsO8uCiHLxvGT-5A1HUbU=&emci=1c261972-9fde-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c3f35452-a8de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7932963) | | | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31984990/294355651/-566338592?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2YzNTQ1Mi1hOGRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k59dQYM71QWN4CXY0xqFr_xsO8uCiHLxvGT-5A1HUbU=&emci=1c261972-9fde-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c3f35452-a8de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7932963)

name: Patty Murray
subject: We have to act on climate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
With a deadly heat dome that drove temperatures in the Pacific Northwest to record highs, it’s clearer than ever that the climate crisis is on our doorstep. It’s the most urgent issue of our time.
#
Peter,
With a deadly heat dome that drove temperatures in the Pacific Northwest to record highs, it’s clearer than ever that the climate crisis is on our doorstep. It’s the most urgent issue of our time.
As Congress prepares its upcoming infrastructure package and budget, we must seize the opportunity to not only take action to combat the climate crisis, but to create millions of good jobs, ensure climate justice, invest in clean energy, and boost our economy.
**[Add your name now to call on Congress to act on climate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31985103/294356057/-1581318983?ms=pm_em_210706_1&refcode=pm_em_210706_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjNlNDBkNy1hOGRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFA-9xstdpDhQr7-yqhHZaVpw-nZ2VfkMRTY10-224Q=&emci=bdde3b78-88de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ab3e40d7-a8de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**
We knew that the climate crisis posed serious threats to our future, but from the deadly heat wave at the end of June to extreme wildfires and more, the future is here. We are experiencing the impacts of the climate crisis firsthand.
And Washington state isn’t the only place experiencing extreme weather and other dangerous impacts of the climate crisis. Devastation is happening across the country and around the globe.
We have to take action -- and here’s the good news: we can. We can build a new, clean energy future that creates millions of good-paying jobs for American workers and strengthens our economy and helps protect communities most likely to suffer the consequences of climate change.
**[Peter, I’m pushing to include climate action in the infrastructure package and budget reconciliation because this is our chance to tackle the climate crisis and invest in our future. Are you with me? Sign my petition now to demand Congress take action on this urgent issue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31985104/294356058/-1581318983?ms=pm_em_210706_1&refcode=pm_em_210706_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjNlNDBkNy1hOGRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFA-9xstdpDhQr7-yqhHZaVpw-nZ2VfkMRTY10-224Q=&emci=bdde3b78-88de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ab3e40d7-a8de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Patty

**[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31985105/294356059/-1581318983?ms=pm_em_210706_1&refcode=pm_em_210706_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjNlNDBkNy1hOGRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFA-9xstdpDhQr7-yqhHZaVpw-nZ2VfkMRTY10-224Q=&emci=bdde3b78-88de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ab3e40d7-a8de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Pride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
The LGBTQ+ community deserves equal rights and dignity under the law, and the time to act is now.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31985605/294357924/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210706-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGYyOGI4YS1hYWRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=le9djHacabxhVOptGvzW8WhWf-WFCA15DIsJzt3xS-8=)
---
| Pride Month for most people may have ended, but in San Diego, it's just starting. As the proud sister of two LGBTQ+ siblings and the proud representative of Hillcrest, the heart of San Diego’s LGBTQ+ community, I’m grateful for an extra month to mark Pride and everything it represents.

Pride is a celebration and a protest — a month (or two) dedicated to love, equality, the LGBTQ+ activists who forged the path before us, and a reminder of all the important work we have left to do. We’ve come so far, but we still have a long way to go to ensure full and equal rights for the LGBTQ+ community.

**In Congress, I’m fighting for all of our siblings to have equal protection under the law. I’m especially proud to be an original co-sponsor of the Equality Act, a bill that prohibits discrimination on the basis of sex, gender identity, and sexual orientation in housing, employment, education, credit, the jury system, and more.**

I’m so grateful that the House made the Equality Act a priority this year. In February, we passed this landmark piece of legislation with bipartisan support. Now, all eyes are on the Senate. If the Equality Act passes there, President Biden has promised to sign it into law.

[_**We need to send a unified message to the Senate — that the LGBTQ+ community deserves equal rights and dignity under the law, and the time to act is now. Will you add your name today to show your support for the Equality Act?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31985606/294357925/1151615689?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGYyOGI4YS1hYWRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=le9djHacabxhVOptGvzW8WhWf-WFCA15DIsJzt3xS-8=&emci=c9995f52-7dde-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d4f28b8a-aade-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=14239920)

Thank you so much,

Sara

If the Equality Act passes there, President Biden has promised to sign it into law. Thank you so much, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Looking for input from our team
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Thanks to supporters like you, we had an amazing first month. Thousands of Floridians have stepped up by spreading the word, donating, and offering words of encouragement at every turn.

We’re in a strong position to defeat Ron DeSantis next year, but we need your input. As we kick off our second month of this campaign, please click here to share your input on the issues that matter most to you right now. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/HU6PiCiYi0mzy14f6wh4mg2]

For years, Florida’s system has worked really well for a small group of people and left the rest of us behind. When we make our voices heard, elected Republicans ignore our interests and make it harder for us to vote.

It’s time to break Florida’s rigged system and build a state that works for everyone. That’s why I’m running for governor, and it’s why I’m asking for your input early and often in this campaign.

Take Our Survey [https://secure.ngpvan.com/HU6PiCiYi0mzy14f6wh4mg2]

This race won’t be easy, but I know that our collective voices are stronger than the system that has cut us out for decades.

Together, we’re going to win this race, stop Ron DeSantis, and break the rigged system in Florida that has left far too many of us behind.

Thanks for your support and for making your voice heard.

Warmly,

Nikki

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailfooternf]

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. | Peter,

Today marks six months since the deadly insurrection at the United States Capitol, in which right-wing extremists stormed and desecrated our nation’s Capitol in promotion of the “Big Lie” that Joe Biden did not win the presidential election.

**Yet still, six months later, those responsible for inciting and perpetrating the violent insurrection have not been held accountable** — in fact, many Republican Members of Congress have defended them, calling the event a “peaceful protest” even after their lives were endangered by those attempting to undermine our democracy.

At the top of the list of those responsible? Former President Donald Trump, who held a rally immediately preceding the violent insurrection during which he instructed his supporters to “fight like hell.”

[_**Add your name today to demand that if the Congressional commission finds wrongdoing they hold the organizers and participants of the January 6 insurrection accountable for their actions.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31986923/294361969/-737941484?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGExZGEyNC1iMGRlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfn3oPIP29QA9RD27Fiea3DCMWBW9Z9mZu1K7k7LeUA=&emci=002dcabf-9dde-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9da1da24-b0de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5543981)

body:

| | When running for office, everyone talks about being a hard worker — but what folks say is much less important than what they do.

Day in and day out, Tom is putting in the work necessary to connect with every corner of Wisconsin, and July 4th was no exception. It reminds us of what Wispolitics.com said about Tom months ago: “But insiders say none of the other potential candidates will likely outhustle Nelson.” Tom attended three parades all around the state over this weekend because he knows that representing Wisconsin means getting out there, actively listening, and meeting folks right where they are. From Sheboygan to Oshkosh to Stevens Point, it was great to see folks in person once again.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31987624/294363787/2088402275?refcode=TN_EM_SV_1MO_210706_1_1&refcode2=463f2b7f-b3de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjNmMmI3Zi1iM2RlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5qV4QfmG4FK2YNDOBle1WjKOf42tgZb7dJXgsKs4Y78=&emci=044a00f3-b1de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=463f2b7f-b3de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)
**But here’s the thing:** last weekend was just the beginning. Tom wants to make sure he gets to all 72 counties and see and meet as many folks as possible — because being a successful Senator is impossible without actively listening and engaging with the dreams and aspirations of every community. And we know Ron Johnson hasn’t met with regular voters in years, preferring the confines of Fox News tv studios.

Soon, as long as it's safe, we want to visit your neighborhood; grab coffee at your favorite spot or have a burger at your favorite diner.

[But to do that, we need to first know where to go. What’s a good spot to meet people in your town? Click here to let us know >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31987625/294363793/2088402275?refcode=TN_EM_SV_1MO_210706_1_1&refcode2=463f2b7f-b3de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjNmMmI3Zi1iM2RlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5qV4QfmG4FK2YNDOBle1WjKOf42tgZb7dJXgsKs4Y78=&emci=044a00f3-b1de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=463f2b7f-b3de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)

Nelson for Senate

name: Key Vote ALERT
subject: 1 Vote Away
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57881528:65YE9clcN:m:1:3253819041:ADE582C6A1C6D7AEEAF6341DB54C6AFE:r "Headline") Peter: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57881528:65YE9clcN:m:1:3253819041:ADE582C6A1C6D7AEEAF6341DB54C6AFE:r "Sen. Ron Johnson")**[You must watch this video.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57881528:65YE9clcN:m:1:3253819041:ADE582C6A1C6D7AEEAF6341DB54C6AFE:r "You must watch this video.")** FINALLY, someone in the Senate sees the push for D.C. statehood as a power grab by liberals. The Senate recently held hearings on D.C. statehood, and Sen. Ron Johnson wasn't afraid to speak his mind on this issue. | _" This seems like just a naked power grab... This an elite group of people here that have a vested interest in the power of the federal government."_
---
Thank you, Senator Johnson. **You are a true patriot.**
We know how HE is going to vote - now we need Sen. Kyrsten Sinema to join him. **If we can persuade her to join us, the push for D.C. statehood will FAIL.**
Democrats were willing to eliminate the filibuster to make D.C. a state, but Sens Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema have publicly opposed the bill, effectively killing it.
We can do the same for D.C. statehood - **_but we have to act NOW._**
**[Make your immediate and generous investment of $25, $50, $100, or more to help us pressure Senator Sinema into opposing the D.C. Statehood bill!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57881528:65YE9clcN:m:1:3253819041:ADE582C6A1C6D7AEEAF6341DB54C6AFE:r "Make your immediate and
generous investment of $25, $50, $100, or more to help us pressure Senator Sinema into opposing the D.C. Statehood bill!")**
**We will continue to execute our aggressive voter targeting, educational outreach, and mobilization strategy to stop the D.C. Statehood agenda in Congress with your support. We are winning, but we cannot give up in these final weeks.**
**[I'm counting on you to chip in $100, $50, $25, or whatever you can afford toward our efforts to persuade Sen. Sinema before it's too late! Will you help us fund this effort?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57881528:65YE9clcN:m:1:3253819041:ADE582C6A1C6D7AEEAF6341DB54C6AFE:r "I'm counting on you to chip in $100, $50, $25, or whatever you
can afford toward our efforts to persuade Sen. Sinema before it's too late! Will you help us fund this effort?")**
**With 45 co-sponsors to this bill, the left will have a field day pressuring Republicans and moderate Democrats to buckle. D.C.** Statehood is a top issue for the radical left, and they will do everything in their power to push it to Joe Biden's desk before the end of the year.
With the first Senate vote coming up, you and I must act quickly.
**[Will you help us defeat the radical left's attempts to force D.C. Statehood through the U.S. Senate?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57881528:65YE9clcN:m:1:3253819041:ADE582C6A1C6D7AEEAF6341DB54C6AFE:r "Will you help us defeat the radical left's attempts to force D.C. Statehood through the U.S. Senate?")**
I'm waiting to hear back from you.
Thank you,

James V. Lacy
President, U.S. Justice Foundation

body:
|
---

| | Members of the House select committee to investigate the January 6 insurrection have been announced; eight picks come from Nancy Pelosi and five from Kevin McCarthy. Pelosi, understandably, nominated only members that understand the full extent of the damage that that dark day had on our democracy. McCarthy, on the other hand, is rumored to be considering nominating SEVERAL members of Congress who may have played an **intimate** role in the planning and execution of that unprecedented attack on the cornerstone of our democracy. AOC rightfully called McCarthy out, saying these Republicans can't “be a part of the investigation” into the January 6 terrorist attack. **Here at When Democrats Turn Out, we're taking this a step further, and we want to know if you agree:** **Do you think Republicans should have to answer questions about their culpability in the January 6 insurrection?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31988979/294375222/-590456323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YWY3YTdiLWJhZGUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8QUHRUOq6TP_uw0am0KbBlMZsuoaQQ6AA3YyNhCoEE4=&emci=4d925ad2-71de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=24af7a7b-bade-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31988980/294375223/-590456323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YWY3YTdiLWJhZGUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8QUHRUOq6TP_uw0am0KbBlMZsuoaQQ6AA3YyNhCoEE4=&emci=4d925ad2-71de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=24af7a7b-bade-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)**

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/SGmf5nmbxFEeghKSPkz63Ol6zc1fSiuX3PGZenc6IPg=/8LDrxoWu6yhlCY-VbXLNUK50udHK_rtofy__PcafzpE=) **" U.S. Rep. | Peter,

In case you missed it, _The Seattle Times_ highlighted Derek's efforts to reform and modernize Congress!

As chairman of the Select Committee on the Modernization of Congress, Derek is making Congress work better for the American people. **The first representative to ever do so.** Derek is unapologetically and boldly shifting congressional culture to **reward policy making and collaboration** rather than partisan bickering.

In a time of historic partisan gridlock, Derek's efforts are nothing short of revolutionary. His select committee has already developed numerous recommendations for how to improve Congress, and Derek hopes to offer these final recommendations in the fall. But he isn't waiting to start implementing changes to create a more productive environment: Derek's ensured the committee has functioned in a collaborative and bipartisan manner since the beginning.

As _The Seattle Times_ put it: "In tackling the roots of Congressional dysfunction, Kilmer and his colleagues have taken on one of the moment's greatest challenges."

**[To support Derek's work to make Congress more productive and responsive to the American people, will you share this article on Facebook? Show your support for Derek today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/SGmf5nmbxFEeghKSPkz63Ol6zc1fSiuX3PGZenc6IPg=/8LDrxoWu6yhlCY-VbXLNUK50udHK_rtofy__PcafzpE=)**

Thank you,

Colin

Colin McCann
Political Director
Derek Kilmer for Congress

P.S. Click [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/SGmf5nmbxFEeghKSPkz63Ol6zc1fSiuX3PGZenc6IPg=/4jxBI70ZS_mVsU5Gqp5UbUSqwDKqQSuyizD3iFZ31-Y=) to read the full article from _The Seattle Times!_ | [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/SGmf5nmbxFEeghKSPkz63Ol6zc1fSiuX3PGZenc6IPg=/Zi_Bv03chmeonWo5CJzdWmmK97yVUSxzBvB02SJ5nI0=?gpsid=50_115_19629&refcode=em21_210706_ICYMI_engg_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210706_ICYMI_engg_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

| | Team, Across the country, Republicans are attacking abortion rights. Conservative politicians think they have the right to dictate decisions between pregnant people and their doctors. That’s why, along with fellow Nevadan Catherine Cortez Masto, I’m standing in support of the Women’s Health Protection Act. This Act will continue to defend the right to reproductive care, no matter your age, race, or economic status. [**Will you add your name in support of reproductive freedom and stand with us in our efforts to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31989289/294379861/493581375?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDY5ZjE5My1iY2RlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1MWWIkLdULCZojhAm81clTWhdBs1bJvAZQObSMFa8M=&emci=82d9effc-8bde-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9d69f193-bcde-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957) | | | [Add My Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31989290/294379864/493581375?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDY5ZjE5My1iY2RlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1MWWIkLdULCZojhAm81clTWhdBs1bJvAZQObSMFa8M=&emci=82d9effc-8bde-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9d69f193-bcde-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)
---
This Act guarantee’s a pregnant person’s right to access an abortion _without any unnecessary restrictions_ that interfere with their choice. Politicians shouldn’t be in the doctor’s office with the patient and doctor.
It’s absolutely essential that we protect reproductive rights. We can’t let politicians make these critical, _personal_ decisions for others. [**That’s why I need you to join Senator Cortez Masto and me and sign on to support the Women’s Health Protection Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31989291/294379866/493581375?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDY5ZjE5My1iY2RlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1MWWIkLdULCZojhAm81clTWhdBs1bJvAZQObSMFa8M=&emci=82d9effc-8bde-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9d69f193-bcde-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)

In solidarity,
Susie

name: Stand with Derek Schmidt
subject: Derek will defend religious liberties.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
We’re fighting for Kansas Friend, I hope I’ve made it clear what my priorities as the future Governor of Kansas will be: ** ** **I will**** _always_****prioritize the interests of the people of Kansas.** ** ** It’s clear that Democrats in Washington, and those here in Kansas, want to dismantle everything President Trump did for our state - _and America_ \- which is why it’s important you know that I’ll always fight to protect our America First policies. ** ** That means fighting back against big government overreach in our state, just like I have done as attorney general. ** ** I’m **ready** to lead Kansas toward a better future, but I’ll need the support of Patriots, like YOU, if I’m going to be successful. ** ** _With your help, we’ll keep Kansas free of overreach from Washington, and continue making our state the greatest to live, work, and raise a family. _ **

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said, Peter…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882713:6Rp-tclHN:m:1:3253819041:04C9DB95BB1B87CC6586E08CA7975272:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882713:6Rp-tclHN:m:1:3253819041:04C9DB95BB1B87CC6586E08CA7975272:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. [**But there 's something you can do.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882713:6Rp-tclHN:m:1:3253819041:04C9DB95BB1B87CC6586E08CA7975272:r) That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882713:6Rp-tclHN:m:1:3253819041:04C9DB95BB1B87CC6586E08CA7975272:r) And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882713:6Rp-tclHN:m:1:3253819041:04C9DB95BB1B87CC6586E08CA7975272:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882713:6Rp-tclHN:m:1:3253819041:04C9DB95BB1B87CC6586E08CA7975272:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882713:6Rp-tclHN:m:1:3253819041:04C9DB95BB1B87CC6586E08CA7975272:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Why this is so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s been six months since the deadly attack on our Capitol, country, and democracy.
#
Peter,
It has been exactly six months since the deadly January 6 attack — the most destructive attack on the U.S. Capitol since the War of 1812. My team sent you an email in the wake of that assault, and I’ve included it at the end of my note today so we can remember what that moment was like.
**But we have to remember that this was not just a deadly attack on the Capitol, it was a direct attack on our democracy. The people that stormed the Capitol — incited by Donald Trump — were trying to overturn the election results. They were trying to deny the will of the people.**
Six months later, we must do everything we can to protect our democracy. But if Senate Democrats don’t act now to end the filibuster and pass the For The People Act, our democracy is at even greater risk.
Mitch McConnell and the GOP are blocking any effort to strengthen voting rights and fully investigate the January 6 attack. At the same time, dangerous voter suppression laws are being passed across the country to block the vote and the voice of the people. The integrity of the 2022 and 2024 elections are on the line.
**Without immediate action on voting rights, democracy is at serious risk.** That’s why I’m leading the fight to end the filibuster and protect our democracy — and it’s why I’m redoubling those efforts today as we remember what happened to our country exactly six months ago.
[**If you agree that we need to end the filibuster and pass the For the People Act, support me in this fight with a $3 donation today. It will take serious people power to preserve our democracy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210706?refcode=em20210706-439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=439_420207_qYTzpQ&akid=439%2E420207%2EqYTzpQ)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210706?refcode=em20210706-439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=439_420207_qYTzpQ&akid=439%2E420207%2EqYTzpQ)**
In solidarity,
Pramila
\----Forwarded Message----
Date: January 7, 2021
From: Team Jayapal
Subject: We’re demanding justice
Peter, yesterday was a dark day in our country's history.
Emboldened and incited by Donald Trump, domestic terrorists launched the most violent assault on the U.S. Capitol since the War of 1812 in an attempt to overturn the results of the 2020 election and attack our democracy. Four lives were lost.
Pramila and all of us at Team Jayapal are safe. **But we're clear-eyed and undeterred about the work ahead.**
Yesterday evening, Pramila quickly called on Vice President Mike Pence and the Cabinet to immediately remove Donald Trump by invoking the 25th Amendment. Today, she called on Congress to urgently reconvene and signed on to once again impeach this president.
With 13 days to go until inauguration day, we'll undoubtedly be told these fights are in vain. We'll be told to just let it go. But we can't. And if enough of us join the call to hold Trump fully accountable right now, our demands will be impossible to ignore. [**You can help grow our grassroots movement for justice with a contribution to Pramila's campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210706?refcode=em20210706-439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=39&refcode2=439_420207_qYTzpQ&akid=439%2E420207%2EqYTzpQ)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210706?refcode=em20210706-439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&refcode2=439_420207_qYTzpQ&akid=439%2E420207%2EqYTzpQ)**
Pramila led the fight to impeach Trump in 2019 because it was clear he had abused the power of his office by trying to coerce a foreign government to interfere in our elections. _"We take our power and collectively, through our elections, we entrust it to a President who must always act in OUR interest — not their own."_ These words still hold true today.
In November, voters chose compassion, truth, and science over cruelty, fear, and lies. Our leaders should respect the will of the people — not a small group of domestic terrorists in pursuit of a coup against our democracy.
No more excuses. Donald Trump has to go — and we will hold him accountable.
**[Join Pramila in this fight with a contribution today. With your support, we can loudly and unequivocally demand justice — not later, but _NOW._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210706?refcode=em20210706-439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&refcode2=439_420207_qYTzpQ&akid=439%2E420207%2EqYTzpQ)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210706-439-footer&t=42&refcode2=439_420207_qYTzpQ&akid=439%2E420207%2EqYTzpQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=43&akid=439%2E420207%2EqYTzpQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=44&akid=439%2E420207%2EqYTzpQ)

---
| Peter,
---
| Over the weekend, American athlete **Gwen Berry _turned her back_ on the American flag and National Anthem** after winning a spot to represent Team USA at the Summer Olympics. **[I need you to sign our petition](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882729:6UbOtclnN:m:1:3253819041:E732635F65094A2191CFE6A97E39AAEA:r "I need you to sign our petition")** **DEMANDING** the U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee: **[BAN Gwen Berry and ANY anti-American athlete from Team USA at the Tokyo Olympics this summer.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882729:6UbOtclnN:m:1:3253819041:E732635F65094A2191CFE6A97E39AAEA:r "BAN Gwen Berry and ANY anti-American athlete from Team USA at the Tokyo Olympics this
summer.")**
---
| | | [SIGN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882729:6UbOtclnN:m:1:3253819041:E732635F65094A2191CFE6A97E39AAEA:r)
---
| After winning 3rd place _and_ a spot at the Olympics during the U.S. Track and Field Trials, **Gwen literally _turned away_ from the American flag** as "The Star-Spangled Banner" played. She then draped herself in a shirt that said "activist athlete." Later, she said, "**The anthem doesn't speak for me. It never has.''** POOR OPPRESSED GWEN, having to _suffer through the National Anthem_ while competing for a spot _on Team USA._ Newsflash, Gwen: representing the USA at the Olympics is a _privilege_. **If you don 't like this country, you don't DESERVE to represent us on the world stage.** **[Sign the petition if you agree: NO anti-American athletes on Team USA.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882729:6UbOtclnN:m:1:3253819041:E732635F65094A2191CFE6A97E39AAEA:r "Sign the petition if you agree: NO anti-American athletes on Team USA.")**
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57882729:6UbOtclnN:m:1:3253819041:E732635F65094A2191CFE6A97E39AAEA:r)
---
| Thanks,

Candace
---

President Biden can’t fire Trump’s Postmaster General, Louis DeJoy. So even with Democrats in office, the Postal Service is still in trouble!! Here’s what’s at stake: | Waiting for your response, \-- Team Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. name: CONDEMN TRUMP (via DCCC)
subject: 15O,OOO anti-Trump signatures needed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you add your name to CONDEMN Trump and his Republicans for inciting violence in our nation's capital? >> | | | | **15O,OOO ANTI-TRUMP SIGNATURES NEEDED:**

Six months ago today, Donald Trump incited an insurrection at our nation's Capitol.

But since then, Republicans have refused to help our nation heal or hold the perpetrators of this attack accountable.

So it's up to us:**

Will you add your name to CONDEMN Trump and his Republicans for inciting violence in our nation's capital? >>**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)
---|---|---

Six months ago today, we witnessed an attack that shook us to our core.

White supremacist rioters desecrated our Capitol -- **_and they did so at the calling of the sitting president, Donald Trump._**

We were disgusted, but hardly surprised.

Trump and his Republicans have pushed dangerous lies for years. Their false crusade on voter fraud and the results of the 2O2O election only added fuel to the fire.

And over the past six months, top Republicans have done everything in their power to defend Trump's actions and downplay this unprecedented attack on our democracy.

But make no mistake: **Six months ago, Trump and his Republicans pushed our country to its breaking point _\-- and now, the future of our democracy depends on us rising up like never before._**

So on this six-month anniversary of the January 6 insurrection, we must show our country -- and the world -- we refuse to let Trump continue his dangerous disregard for our democracy unchecked.

[**SIGN YOUR NAME NOW: Condemn Trump and his Republicans for inciting an unprecedented insurrection and attacking our very democracy >>**](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thank you for your action at this historic moment.

\- All of us at the DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45260014&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0MTcyMDczNgS2&l=10390000&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45260014&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0MTcyMDczNgS2&l=10390000&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
